Hello memory agent, you are continuing to observe the primary Claude session.

<observed_from_primary_session>
  <user_request>1. 對
2. ok</user_request>
  <requested_at>2026-06-22</requested_at>
</observed_from_primary_session>

You are a Claude-Mem, a specialized observer tool for creating searchable memory FOR FUTURE SESSIONS.

CRITICAL: Record what was LEARNED/BUILT/FIXED/DEPLOYED/CONFIGURED, not what you (the observer) are doing.

You do not have access to tools. All information you need is provided in <observed_from_primary_session> messages. Create observations from what you observe - no investigation needed.

Your job is to monitor a different Claude Code session happening RIGHT NOW, with the goal of creating observations and progress summaries as the work is being done LIVE by the user. You are NOT the one doing the work - you are ONLY observing and recording what is being built, fixed, deployed, or configured in the other session.

SPATIAL AWARENESS: Tool executions include the working directory (tool_cwd) to help you understand:
- Which repository/project is being worked on
- Where files are located relative to the project root
- How to match requested paths to actual execution paths

WHAT TO RECORD
--------------
Focus on deliverables and capabilities:
- What the system NOW DOES differently (new capabilities)
- What shipped to users/production (features, fixes, configs, docs)
- Changes in technical domains (auth, data, UI, infra, DevOps, docs)

Use verbs like: implemented, fixed, deployed, configured, migrated, optimized, added, refactored

✅ GOOD EXAMPLES (describes what was built):
- "Authentication now supports OAuth2 with PKCE flow"
- "Deployment pipeline runs canary releases with auto-rollback"
- "Database indexes optimized for common query patterns"

❌ BAD EXAMPLES (describes observation process - DO NOT DO THIS):
- "Analyzed authentication implementation and stored findings"
- "Tracked deployment steps and logged outcomes"
- "Monitored database performance and recorded metrics"

WHEN TO SKIP
------------
Skip routine operations:
- Empty status checks
- Package installations with no errors
- Simple file listings
- Repetitive operations you've already documented
- If file related research comes back as empty or not found
- **No output necessary if skipping.**

IMPORTANT: Continue generating observations from tool use messages using the XML structure below.

OUTPUT FORMAT
-------------
Output observations using this XML structure:

```xml
<observation>
  <type>[ bugfix | feature | refactor | change | discovery | decision ]</type>
  <!--
    **type**: MUST be EXACTLY one of these 6 options (no other values allowed):
      - bugfix: something was broken, now fixed
      - feature: new capability or functionality added
      - refactor: code restructured, behavior unchanged
      - change: generic modification (docs, config, misc)
      - discovery: learning about existing system
      - decision: architectural/design choice with rationale
  -->
  <title>[**title**: Short title capturing the core action or topic]</title>
  <subtitle>[**subtitle**: One sentence explanation (max 24 words)]</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
  </facts>
  <!--
    **facts**: Concise, self-contained statements
Each fact is ONE piece of information
      No pronouns - each fact must stand alone
      Include specific details: filenames, functions, values

**files**: All files touched (full paths from project root)
  -->
  <narrative>[**narrative**: Full context: What was done, how it works, why it matters]</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
  </concepts>
  <!--
    **concepts**: 2-5 knowledge-type categories. MUST use ONLY these exact keywords:
      - how-it-works: understanding mechanisms
      - why-it-exists: purpose or rationale
      - what-changed: modifications made
      - problem-solution: issues and their fixes
      - gotcha: traps or edge cases
      - pattern: reusable approach
      - trade-off: pros/cons of a decision

    IMPORTANT: Do NOT include the observation type (change/discovery/decision) as a concept.
    Types and concepts are separate dimensions.
  -->
  <files_read>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>
```


IMPORTANT! DO NOT do any work right now other than generating this OBSERVATIONS from tool use messages - and remember that you are a memory agent designed to summarize a DIFFERENT claude code session, not this one.

Never reference yourself or your own actions. Do not output anything other than the observation content formatted in the XML structure above. All other output is ignored by the system, and the system has been designed to be smart about token usage. Please spend your tokens wisely on useful observations.

Remember that we record these observations as a way of helping us stay on track with our progress, and to help us keep important decisions and changes at the forefront of our minds! :) Thank you so much for your help!

MEMORY PROCESSING CONTINUED
===========================

PROGRESS SUMMARY CHECKPOINT
===========================
Write progress notes of what was done, what was learned, and what's next. This is a checkpoint to capture progress so far. The session is ongoing - you may receive more requests and tool executions after this summary. Write "next_steps" as the current trajectory of work (what's actively being worked on or coming up next), not as post-session future work. Always write at least a minimal summary explaining current progress, even if work is still in early stages, so that users see a summary output tied to each request.

Claude's Full Response to User:
我已掌握完整架構。補一個關鍵發現：**`SHOW_UI`/`HIDE_UI` 目前整個專案都沒被 dispatch**（`SHOW_UI` 在 ShowState 是註解掉的），所以輪盤現在是常駐顯示、靠 `SET_WHEEL_DATA` 開 Idle。這影響「Active 進場 / Out 退場」要掛哪裡。

基於三個決策 + 現況，我提出實作設計：

---

## 實作設計（待你確認後動手）

### 串接點：用 `FeatureWheelShowState` 的既有時序當 session 邊界
```
OnEnter:
  ① PlayActive()              ← 進場播 1 次（盤面下降+灰塵+光效）

  for each WheelFeature:       ← 既有迴圈
     PlaySpin(SlotIndex)       ← 軟體旋轉(既有) + setSkin(Type) + Collect(中間亮起)  ←取代結果展示牌
     PlayFlyEffect / MarkEffect / dwell  ← 既有（等其他效果演完）

  ② PlayOut()                 ← 全部轉完播 1 次（盤面回歸+中間暗掉）
  RESUME_IDLE → PlayIdle()     ← 待機呼吸（既有事件，改成播 Spine Idle）
```

### 程式改動（3 檔 + 0 prefab 結構改動）

| 檔案 | 改動 | 因果鏈重點 |
|---|---|---|
| `FeatureWheelTypes.ts` | 新增 `TYPE_SKIN_CONFIG`：`Multiplier→"Multiplier"`、`Upgrade→"Upgrade"`、`SymbolConvert→"default"`(暫代,TODO 換 `"Shift"`)、`FreeGame/GrandJP→"default"` + `TypeToSkin()` | 純新增函式，無呼叫者衝突 |
| `FeatureWheelManager.ts` | ①加 `@property(sp.Skeleton) m_bigWheelSpine`；②`PlayLandAnnounce` 改播 `setSkin+Collect`(取代 BG/Symbol 結果卡)；③加 `PlayActive/PlayOut`(走新事件或內部)；④`ResumeIdle` 改播 `Idle` skin=default | `PlayLandAnnounce` 唯一呼叫者=`PlaySpin`(同檔)；`m_resultNode`/`m_result*SpriteChange` 改為不使用(保留屬性避免 prefab 報錯) |
| `FeatureWheelShowState.ts` | OnEnter 開頭 `PlayActive`、迴圈後 `PlayOut`；移除 `HIDE_RESULT` dwell 那段(結果卡已不用) | `HIDE_RESULT` 事件變孤兒→評估移除 |

### 暫代/擱置（明確標 TODO）
- `Shift` skin 暫用 `default`（美術未補）
- `Symbol_Wheel` 同步播放擱置（資源不存在）
- 結果展示牌 BG/Symbol 邏輯停用，但 `@property` 先保留（避免 prefab 反序列化警告），標 TODO 待美術定案後清除

---

兩個要你點頭的點：

1. **這個串接點（用 ShowState 當 session 邊界、Active/Out 各播一次）**符合你要的嗎？
2. 這是 **大型改動**，依專案規範可開 `/dev-design` workflow 做多方案對抗驗證。但設計已被你前面三個決策定到很細，我傾向**直接照上面實作**（走退化路徑 + always-on 因果鏈護欄）。**OK 直接做，還是要我開 workflow？**

Respond in this XML format:
<summary>
  <request>[Short title capturing the user's request AND the substance of what was discussed/done]</request>
  <investigated>[What has been explored so far? What was examined?]</investigated>
  <learned>[What have you learned about how things work?]</learned>
  <completed>[What work has been completed so far? What has shipped or changed?]</completed>
  <next_steps>[What are you actively working on or planning to work on next in this session?]</next_steps>
  <notes>[Additional insights or observations about the current progress]</notes>
</summary>

IMPORTANT! DO NOT do any work right now other than generating this next PROGRESS SUMMARY - and remember that you are a memory agent designed to summarize a DIFFERENT claude code session, not this one.

Never reference yourself or your own actions. Do not output anything other than the summary content formatted in the XML structure above. All other output is ignored by the system, and the system has been designed to be smart about token usage. Please spend your tokens wisely on useful summary content.

Thank you, this summary will be very useful for keeping track of our progress!

attachment.content:
- deep-research: Deep research harness — fan-out web searches, fetch sources, adversarially verify claims, synthesize a cited report. - When the user wants a deep, multi-source, fact-checked research report on any topic. BEFORE invoking, check if the question is specific enough to research directly — if underspecified (e.g., "what car to buy" without budget/use-case/region), ask 2-3 clarifying questions to narrow scope. Then pass the refined question as args, weaving the answers in.
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings; ultra: deep multi-agent review in the cloud). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled cloud agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring cloud agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Reference for the Claude API / Anthropic SDK — model ids, pricing, params, streaming, tool use, MCP, agents, caching, token counting, model migration.
TRIGGER — read BEFORE opening the target file; don't skip because it "looks like a one-liner" — whenever: the prompt names Claude/Anthropic in any form (Claude, Anthropic, Fable, Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, `anthropic`, `@anthropic-ai`, `claude-*`, `us.anthropic.*`, `[1m]`); the user asks about an LLM (pricing/model choice/limits/caching) — never answer from memory; OR the task is LLM-shaped with provider unstated (agent/MCP/tool-definition/multi-agent/RAG/LLM-judge/computer-use; generate/summarize/extract/classify/rewrite/converse over NL; debugging refusals/cutoffs/streaming/tool-calls/tokens).
SKIP only when another provider is being worked on (overrides all triggers): OpenAI/GPT/Gemini/Llama/Mistral/Cohere/Ollama named in the query; OR `grep -rE 'openai|langchain_openai|google.generativeai|genai|mistralai|cohere|ollama'` over the project hits (run this grep FIRST if no provider named — don't Read the file).
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

0~360、額外圈數=0）會反向旋轉（DR-1 high）；BC-7 完成訊號鏈在規格中空白（DR-2 high）。\\n**原因**：把「既有機制存在」（A 級字面證據為真）當成「既有機制直接適用新需求」。字面證據只證明機制存在，不證明其行為符合新 BC。\\n**教訓**：設計「沿用 X 機制」時，必須核對 X 的實際行為是否滿足新 BC，不能只確認 X 存在。design-reviewer 第 1 輪實際 Read 了 MultiplierManager.ts 源碼才抓出反向缺陷——cross-source 核對源碼是攔截此類落差的關鍵。\\n**檢測信號**：設計規格出現「沿用/複用 [既有函式]」但未說明該函式行為如何滿足對應 BC-x → design-reviewer 應 Read 該函式源碼驗證行為，不接受「存在即適用」。\\n**failure_type**：judgment_failure（架構師判斷失誤，被 Phase 1b design-reviewer 攔截）\\n\\n### 關鍵教訓 2 · `[orchestrator]` — 委派子 agent 回傳報告後主 agent 漏寫 artifact 檔\\n**問題**：Phase 3 content.thinking:
The user is asking me to generate a progress summary. I need to look at what was discussed in the observed session.

From the observed session, I can see:
- User request was "1. 對\n2. ok" which appears to be Chinese for "1. Yes\n2. ok"
- Claude's full response discusses a detailed implementation design for a feature wheel system in what appears to be a game development context

Let me analyze what was actually done:

1. **Request**: The user confirmed/approved two previous decisions (saying "對" = "yes" and "ok")

2. **Investigated**: Claude examined the current state of the codebase and discovered that `SHOW_UI`/`HIDE_UI` are not being dispatched anywhere in the project (SHOW_UI is commented out in ShowState), so the wheel is always visible and relies on `SET_WHEEL_DATA` to start Idle state.

3. **Learned**: 
   - The wheel display is currently always-on, managed via `SET_WHEEL_DATA` rather than explicit show/hide
   - This affects where the Active entry/Out exit animations should be attached
   - The existing `FeatureWheelShowState` timing can be used as session boundaries

4. **Completed**: Claude proposed a detailed implementation design including:
   - Integration points using `FeatureWheelShowState` timing as session boundaries
   - Code changes across 3 files (FeatureWheelTypes.ts, FeatureWheelManager.ts, FeatureWheelShowState.ts)
   - Skin configuration mapping for different wheel types
   - Temporary workarounds for missing assets

5. **Next steps**: Waiting for user confirmation on:
   - Whether the proposed integration point (using ShowState as session boundary) is correct
   - Whether to proceed directly with implementation or run a `/dev-design` workflow for multi-approach validation

6. **Notes**: This is positioned as a large-scale change with clear guard rails (fallback paths and always-on causal chain), with temporary TODOs marked for missing art assets.

content.text:
<summary>
  <request>User approved two previous decisions regarding Feature Wheel animation implementation; Claude presented complete implementation design for Spine-based wheel animations with session boundary integration</request>
  <investigated>Current codebase state revealed that SHOW_UI/HIDE_UI events are not dispatched (SHOW_UI commented out in ShowState), meaning the wheel is always visible and managed via SET_WHEEL_DATA triggering Idle state rather than explicit show/hide mechanics</investigated>
  <learned>FeatureWheelShowState's existing timing sequence can serve as session boundaries for Active/Out animations; wheel display is currently "always-on" architecture; PlayActive (entry) and PlayOut (exit) animations should wrap the existing per-feature spin loop; skin switching (Multiplier/Upgrade/default) can replace the current result card BG/Symbol display system</learned>
  <completed>Detailed implementation design proposed covering: (1) integration points using FeatureWheelShowState OnEnter/Exit timing, (2) code changes across 3 files with TYPE_SKIN_CONFIG mapping, PlayActive/PlayOut methods, and modified PlayLandAnnounce to use setSkin+Collect instead of result cards, (3) temporary workarounds marked with TODO for missing Shift skin and Symbol_Wheel synchronization, (4) fallback strategy preserving existing @property references to avoid prefab deserialization warnings</completed>
  <next_steps>Awaiting user confirmation on two decision points: whether the proposed session boundary approach (ShowState-based Active/Out timing) matches requirements, and whether to proceed directly with implementation or run /dev-design workflow for multi-approach validation</next_steps>
  <notes>Design is heavily constrained by three prior user decisions, making it narrow enough for direct implementation with guard rails (degradation paths + always-on causal chain); marked as large-scale change but with clear rollback safety through preserved properties and TODO-flagged temporary solutions</notes>
</summary>

0~360、額外圈數=0）會反向旋轉（DR-1 high）；BC-7 完成訊號鏈在規格中空白（DR-2 high）。\\n**原因**：把「既有機制存在」（A 級字面證據為真）當成「既有機制直接適用新需求」。字面證據只證明機制存在，不證明其行為符合新 BC。\\n**教訓**：設計「沿用 X 機制」時，必須核對 X 的實際行為是否滿足新 BC，不能只確認 X 存在。design-reviewer 第 1 輪實際 Read 了 MultiplierManager.ts 源碼才抓出反向缺陷——cross-source 核對源碼是攔截此類落差的關鍵。\\n**檢測信號**：設計規格出現「沿用/複用 [既有函式]」但未說明該函式行為如何滿足對應 BC-x → design-reviewer 應 Read 該函式源碼驗證行為，不接受「存在即適用」。\\n**failure_type**：judgment_failure（架構師判斷失誤，被 Phase 1b design-reviewer 攔截）\\n\\n### 關鍵教訓 2 · `[orchestrator]` — 委派子 agent 回傳報告後主 agent 漏寫 artifact 檔\\n**問題**：Phase 3 code-reviewer（task sub-agent）把品質報告回傳給主 agent，但主 agent **未實際 Write 到 `P3-quality-review.md`**，磁碟檔殘留上一閉環（ROW_CONFIG）內容。Phase 5 verifier 產出物驗證攔截。\\n**原因**：誤以為子 agent 自己寫了檔（design-reviewer/verifier 確實有 Write 權自寫，但 code-reviewer 那次只回傳 inline）。主 agent 對「子 agent 是否實際落檔」未驗證。\\n**教訓**：委派 task sub-agent 後，主 agent 必須確認其產出**實際寫入指定 artifact 路徑**（agent.md 調用方式「收到結果存入 X」是主 agent 的責任，不可假設子 agent 代寫）。每個 Phase 結束時對該 Phase 的 artifact 做 head 檢查（確認日期/標題屬本閉環）。\\n**檢測信號**：Phase 5 Part C 產出物驗證時，artifact 檔的標題/日期與當前閉環不符 → 產出物錯置，主 agent 補寫。\\n**failure_type**：process_failure（編排疏失，被 Phase 5 verifier 攔截）\\n\\n### Phase 3 / Phase 4\\n- Phase 3：0 high / 2 medium / 1 low，medium 直接採納（R-1 callback 例外隔離、R-2 BindSegmentIcons 冪等、R-3 INIT null 守衛）。安全審查 by-design 跳過。\\n- Phase 4：182/182 通過；設計同步 EH-1/2/3 [testable]→[framework-dependent]（Component-embedded 守衛，純邏輯經 BC-2/3/4 覆蓋）。\\n\\n### 升格檢查（Phase 5 verifier step 9b）\\n- 本閉環 learning-log 新增 2 筆教訓（沿用機制過度推論 / 委派漏寫 artifact）\\n- 全域根因頻率：「沿用機制過度推論」1 次、「委派漏寫 artifact」1 次，最高 1 次 < 3 門檻 → **無升格候選**\\n\\n### 降級檢查（Phase 5 verifier step 9d）\\n- 長期警惕模式：#001-#005 種子（不適用）、#006/#007 真實升格但本閉環無新證據觸及；觀察窗仍 < 10 → **無降級候選**\",\"stderr\":\"\",\"interrupted\":false,\"isImage\":false,\"noOutputExpected\":false}"</outcome>

<observation>
  <type>discovery</type>
  <title>Reviewed closed-loop learning system and recent FeatureWheel work history</title>
  <subtitle>Consulted project's learning log and issue tracking to understand recent patterns before continuing wheel animation work</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>Project uses ".claude-loop/learning-log.md" for per-session learning and "問題追蹤.md" for long-term warning patterns promoted after 3+ occurrences</fact>
    <fact>Recent FeatureWheel work included Phase 1b design review (2 rounds) producing FeatureWheelTypes.ts and FeatureWheelManager.ts with 182 test assertions</fact>
    <fact>Key lesson #1 identified architect judgment failure: assuming existing MultiplierManager.PlayRotateRouletteAnimation would satisfy BC-3 rotation requirements without verifying actual behavior (caused reverse rotation issue DR-1)</fact>
    <fact>Key lesson #2 identified orchestrator process failure: main agent failed to Write P3-quality-review.md after code-reviewer sub-agent returned report, leaving stale file from previous ROW_CONFIG iteration</fact>
    <fact>Long-term warning patterns include #001 (existence claims without verification), #002 (routing vs existence misframing), #003 (single-source inference), all seeded from external sources with no degradation eligibility</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Before proceeding with Spine-based Feature Wheel animation implementation, the session reviewed the project's quality control and learning systems. The project maintains a two-tier knowledge system: short-term "learning-log.md" captures per-session lessons, which get promoted to long-term "warning patterns" in 問題追蹤.md after appearing 3+ times with user confirmation. Recent work on FeatureWheel (FeatureWheelTypes.ts / FeatureWheelManager.ts) went through multi-phase quality gates and uncovered two critical lessons: (1) architect over-inference when assuming existing mechanisms satisfy new requirements without behavior verification, caught when design-reviewer read MultiplierManager source and found reverse rotation; (2) orchestrator artifact-writing gap when sub-agent returns results but main agent assumes the file was written, caught by Phase 5 verifier detecting stale file timestamps. No patterns reached the 3-occurrence upgrade threshold in this cycle. This review provides context for the current Spine animation work's risk profile and quality expectations.</narrative>

content.text:
<observation>
  <type>discovery</type>
  <title>Surveyed existing Spine animation patterns in codebase</title>
  <subtitle>Examined BigWinControll.ts PlayAnimation method to understand established Spine animation patterns before implementing Feature Wheel animations</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>Codebase uses sp.Skeleton component type with setAnimation(), setTrackCompleteListener(), and setCompleteListener() APIs</fact>
    <fact>BigWinControll.ts implements PlayAnimation() with Promise-based pattern: clearTrack() → setToSetupPose() → setAnimation() → listener setup</fact>
    <fact>Animation completion uses dual listener pattern: setTrackCompleteListener() when TrackEntry exists, fallback to setCompleteListener() when null</fact>
    <fact>PlayAnimation signature accepts spine instance, animName, optional isLoop (default false), optional track number (default 0)</fact>
    <fact>Multiple components use sp.Skeleton: BigWinControll (3 instances), MagicPotController, MysteryCashSpine, SpineMultiLangTool demonstrates setSkin() API usage</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Before implementing Spine-based Feature Wheel animations, the session researched existing Spine animation patterns across the codebase. Grep search found sp.Skeleton usage in 40+ locations across BigWinControll, MagicPotController, MysteryCashSpine, and utility classes. Detailed examination of BigWinControll.ts revealed the project's established Promise-based animation pattern: clear existing track, reset to setup pose, call setAnimation() to get TrackEntry, then register completion callback via setTrackCompleteListener (or fallback to setCompleteListener if trackEntry is null). This dual-listener pattern handles edge cases where animation names don't exist. The PlayAnimation method also supports event listeners via setTrackEventListener for mid-animation events. SpineMultiLangTool.ts demonstrates setSkin() usage for switching visual variants. This research establishes the implementation patterns to follow when adding PlayActive/PlayOut/PlayIdle methods to FeatureWheelManager, ensuring consistency with existing codebase conventions.</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>how-it-works</concept>
    <concept>pattern</concept>
  </concepts>

content.text:
<observation>
  <type>discovery</type>
  <title>Examined test file structure and TypeToIconIndex test pattern</title>
  <subtitle>Test file uses check() assertion pattern with BC coverage tracking; TypeToIconIndex mapping provides template for TypeToSkin tests</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>Test file uses custom check(name, condition) function that increments total/passed counters and logs failures</fact>
    <fact>Tests organized by BC (Business Constraint) numbers with descriptive assertion names like 'BC-4 已知：FreeGame→0'</fact>
    <fact>TypeToIconIndex tests cover all 5 known segment types (FreeGame=0, Multiplier=1, Upgrade=2, SymbolConvert=3, GrandJP=4) plus unknown type fallback to DEFAULT_ICON_INDEX</fact>
    <fact>Test file header specifies execution via npx ts-node with commonjs module and --transpile-only flags for zero Cocos Creator dependency</fact>
    <fact>Existing test imports from '../assets/Script/FeatureWheel/FeatureWheelTypes' and tracks 182 total assertions</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Before adding TypeToSkin() tests, the session examined the existing test structure in FeatureWheelTypes.test.ts. The file uses a lightweight assertion pattern with a custom check() function that counts total/passed tests and logs failures, avoiding external test framework dependencies to maintain zero Cocos Creator coupling. TypeToIconIndex tests demonstrate the pattern to follow: one assertion per known segment type verifying the correct mapping (enum value to icon index), plus edge case tests for unknown types returning DEFAULT_ICON_INDEX. The new TypeToSkin() tests will mirror this structure but verify string mappings (Multiplier→"Multiplier", Upgrade→"Upgrade", etc.) with "default" as the fallback for unknown/unsupported types. Test execution uses ts-node with commonjs transpilation, enabling pure Node.js test runs without Cocos environment.</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>how-it-works</concept>
    <concept>pattern</concept>
  </concepts>

</observation>

BIG_WHEEL_DEFAULT_SKIN;\\n}\",\"originalFile\":\"/**\\n * @ch Feature Wheel 純邏輯層\\n * 不依賴 cc 框架型別，可獨立單元測試（對應 P1 設計分層：功能層）\\n * 內容：segment 資料模型、server 介面 adapter、角度計算、type→icon 對照\\n */\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch 轉輪格子功能類型\\n * ⚠️ 數值「刻意對齊後端 server enum」：None=-1, FreeGame=0, Multiplier=1, Upgrade=2, Transfer(符號轉換)=3, Grand(GrandJP)=4\\n * 目前 server↔client 同號 → ParseServerWheelData 直接 passthrough（不做映射）。\\n * 若後端日後改號，務必改回「保留本地編號 + 在 ParseServerWheelData 內加映射層」，不可讓兩邊默默錯位。\\n * 數值契約由測試「enum 對齊 server」鎖定，誤改 enum 值會讓測試變紅。\\n */\\nexport enum FeatureWheelSegmentType {\\n    /**@ch 未觸發（空格，不顯示 icon）*/\\n    None = -1,\\n    /**@ch 觸發 Free Game（MG 專用；server: FreeGame）*/\\n    FreeGame = 0,\\n    /**@ch 乘倍（server: Multiplier）*/\\n    Multiplier = 1,\\n    /**@ch 升級（server: Upgrade）*/\\n    Upgrade = 2,\\n    /**@ch 符號轉換（server: Transfer）*/\\n    SymbolConvert = 3,\\n    /**@ch GRAND JP（FG 專用；server: Grand）*/\\n    GrandJP = 4,\\n}\\n\\n/** @ch 單格描述子 */\\nexport interface SegmentDescriptor {\\n    type: FeatureWheelSegmentType;\\n}\\n\\n/** @ch 落點結果（PLAY_SPIN callback 回傳） */\\nexport interface SpinResult {\\n    index: number;\\n    type: FeatureWheelSegmentType;\\n}\\n\\n/** @ch 轉輪格數（固定 12 格） */\\nexport const FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT = 12;\\n\\n/** @ch 每格角度（12 格均勻 30°） */\\nexport const FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_ANGLE = 360 / FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT;\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch 轉動額外圈數（獎輪手感，單一值 · DR-14）\\n * 注意：值越大峰值角速度越高，12 格重複圖樣易觸發車輪錯覺（視覺反向）。\\n * 與 ROTATE_TIME 搭配控制峰值速度，使其遠低於格距一半（15°/frame@60fps）。\\n * ⚠️ 由 10 格(36°)改 12 格(30°)後臨界值從 18°→15°/frame 收緊，本次未重調轉速參數。\\n */\\nexport const FEATURE_WHEEL_EXTRA_CIRCLES = 2;\\n\\n/** @ch 未知 type 的預設 icon 索引 */\\nexport const DEFAULT_ICON_INDEX = 0;\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch type → SpriteChange icon 索引對照（前端本地，須與 prefab SpriteFrame 陣列順序對應）\\n * ⚠️ DR-12：此對照的「順序語意」與 prefab 圖序須人工核對，dev 斷言只驗數量/key 集合\\n */\\nexport const TYPE_ICON_CONFIG: Readonly<Partial<Record<FeatureWheelSegmentType, number>>> = {\\n    [FeatureWheelSegmentType.FreeGame]: 0,\\n    [FeatureWheelSegmentType.Multiplier]: 1,\\n    [FeatureWheelSegmentType.Upgrade]: 2,\\n    [FeatureWheelSegmentType.SymbolConvert]: 3,\\n    [FeatureWheelSegmentType.GrandJP]: 4,\\n    // None 無 icon（不顯示），刻意不列入；TypeToIconIndex 對未列值回預設、BindSegmentIcons 對 None 清空\\n};\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch type → icon 索引（BC-4）\\n * @param type 功能類型\\n * @returns SpriteChange 索引；未知 type 回傳預設索引\\n */\\nexport function TypeToIconIndex(type: FeatureWheelSegmentType): number {\\n    const idx = TYPE_ICON_CONFIG[type];\\n    return idx === undefined ? DEFAULT_ICON_INDEX : idx;\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch 判斷 type 是否為已知集合內\\n * @param type 功能類型\\n */\\nexport function IsKnownSegmentType(type: number): boolean {\\n    return TYPE_ICON_CONFIG[type as FeatureWheelSegmentType] !== undefined;\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch 本輪是否有「有效轉輪」需要演出（純投影，對應 FeatureWheelShowState 進入守衛 / BC-1）\\n *\\n * 語意：server RoundInfo.WheelFeatures 各項 Type 中，存在任一 ≠ None(-1) → 該輪觸發轉輪、需演出。\\n * 全為 None（如 server 給 [-1] / [-1,-1]）或缺值（null/空陣列）→ 無轉輪、不進演出 State。\\n *\\n * @param types RoundInfo.WheelFeatures.map(w => w.Type)（缺值傳 null/undefined）\\n */\\nexport function HasActiveWheel(types: ReadonlyArray<number> | null | undefined): boolean {\\n    return !!types && types.some(t => t !== FeatureWheelSegmentType.None);\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch 本輪是否有「respin 後段」要套用的轉輪效果 → 對應 FeatureResultShowState 進入守衛。\\n *\\n * 語意：WheelFeatures 各 Type 中存在 Upgrade / Multiplier / SymbolConvert → 末手 respin 後\\n * 需先演各自效果再做收分動畫。FreeGame / GrandJP / None 不計入（FG 收分在前段即做）。\\n *\\n * @param types RoundInfo.WheelFeatures.map(w => w.Type)（缺值傳 null/undefined）\\n */\\nexport function HasPostRespinFeature(types: ReadonlyArray<number> | null | undefined): boolean {\\n    return !!types && types.some(\\n        t => t === FeatureWheelSegmentType.Upgrade ||\\n             t === FeatureWheelSegmentType.Multiplier ||\\n             t === FeatureWheelSegmentType.SymbolConvert,\\n    );\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch 本輪轉輪是否落 FreeGame → 對應 ⑨Scatter 丟場 + ⑩進 FG。\\n * 語意：WheelFeatures 各 Type 中存在 FreeGame(0) → 進 FG 前需演 Scatter 丟場（也可能不演）。\\n *\\n * @param types RoundInfo.WheelFeatures.map(w => w.Type)（缺值傳 null/undefined）\\n */\\nexport function HasFreeGameWheel(types: ReadonlyArray<number> | null | undefined): boolean {\\n    return !!types && types.some(t => t === FeatureWheelSegmentType.FreeGame);\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch 預設 12 格 fallback 組成（server 整層無資料時用）\\n * 3 符號轉換 + 3 乘倍 + 3 升級 + 1 GRAND JP + 1 Free Game + 1 升級補滿\\n */\\nexport function GetDefaultSegments(): SegmentDescriptor[] {\\n    return [\\n        { type: FeatureWheelSegmentType.SymbolConvert },\\n        { type: FeatureWheelSegmentType.Multiplier },\\n        { type: content.thinking:
The user is editing FeatureWheelTypes.ts to add Spine skin mapping functionality. This adds:

1. `BIG_WHEEL_DEFAULT_SKIN` constant set to 'default'
2. `TYPE_SKIN_CONFIG` - a mapping from FeatureWheelSegmentType to Spine skin names
   - Multiplier → 'Multiplier'
   - Upgrade → 'Upgrade'
   - SymbolConvert → 'default' (temporary, with TODO to change to 'Shift' when art assets are ready)
3. `TypeToSkin()` function - converts type to skin name with fallback to default

This mirrors the existing TypeToIconIndex pattern but for Spine skins instead of icon indices. The TODO comment marks the temporary workaround for missing 'Shift' skin.

  </facts>
  <narrative>Implemented Spine skin mapping logic in FeatureWheelTypes.ts following the established TypeToIconIndex pattern. Added TYPE_SKIN_CONFIG as a Readonly Partial Record mapping segment types to Spine skin names used by BigWheel animations for middle-segment highlighting during Collect/Out phases. The mapping covers Multiplier and Upgrade with matching skin names, while SymbolConvert temporarily uses 'default' skin with a TODO marker for future 'Shift' skin replacement when art confirms delivery. FreeGame and GrandJP are intentionally unmapped since they transition to separate flows rather than showing middle-segment effects. TypeToSkin() function retrieves the skin name with nullish coalescing fallback to BIG_WHEEL_DEFAULT_SKIN constant. The implementation maintains zero Cocos Creator dependencies, keeping the pure logic layer testable in Node.js environment. This skin config will drive setSkin() calls in FeatureWheelManager during spin animations to replace the existing result card BG/Symbol display system.</narrative>

  </concepts>

The failure is in an existing test, likely unrelated to the changes just made. The test "SymbolConvert(3) → false" is checking that HasPostRespinFeature([3]) returns false, but it seems to be returning true.

Looking at the HasPostRespinFeature function description from earlier observations:
- It should return true for Upgrade(2), Multiplier(1), SymbolConvert(3)
- It should return false for FreeGame(0), GrandJP(4), None(-1)

But the test expects SymbolConvert(3) to return false. There's a mismatch between the test expectation and the function implementation. This is a pre-existing issue, not caused by the TypeToSkin additions.

<observation>
  <type>discovery</type>
  <title>Located failing test showing SymbolConvert post-respin feature classification mismatch</title>
  <subtitle>Test line 235 expects SymbolConvert to NOT trigger post-respin phase (comment says "前段") but HasPostRespinFeature implementation includes it</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>Failing test at line 235: check('SymbolConvert(3) → false', HasPostRespinFeature([3]) === false) expects false but function returns true</fact>

    <fact>HasPostRespinFeature implementation (lines from FeatureWheelTypes.ts) includes SymbolConvert alongside Upgrade and Multiplier in post-respin check</fact>
    <fact>Test expectations divide features: Upgrade/Multiplier→post-respin (true), SymbolConvert/FreeGame/GrandJP/None→not post-respin (false)</fact>
    <fact>Pre-existing inconsistency unrelated to current Spine animation work, affecting FeatureResultShowState entry guard logic</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Located the source of the test failure at line 235 in the HasPostRespinFeature test section. The test explicitly expects SymbolConvert (type 3) to return false with a comment labeling it "SymbolConvert(3,前段)" (front-segment), indicating it should be processed during the front phase rather than triggering the post-respin feature phase. However, the HasPostRespinFeature implementation in FeatureWheelTypes.ts includes SymbolConvert in its type check alongside Upgrade and Multiplier, causing it to return true. This mismatch represents a pre-existing defect where either the test expectation is outdated or the implementation incorrectly classifies SymbolConvert. The test divides features into two groups: Upgrade/Multiplier triggering post-respin phase (true), and SymbolConvert/FreeGame/GrandJP/None skipping it (false). This impacts FeatureResultShowState entry guard behavior and is unrelated to the current Spine skin mapping work, which passed all new assertions successfully.</narrative>

The session is examining how Spine animations are used in the codebase, specifically looking at:
1. Import patterns for `sp` (Spine) from 'cc' package
2. Whether setSkin() calls are typically followed by setSlotsToSetupPose() or setToSetupPose()

Key findings:
- BigWinControll imports sp from 'cc' at line 1
- MysteryCashSpine also imports sp from 'cc'
- BigWinControll calls setSkin() at line 207 without any accompanying setup pose call
- PlayAnimation method calls setToSetupPose() at line 344 before setAnimation(), but this is separate from the setSkin call

This reveals the codebase pattern: setSkin() is called standalone, while setToSetupPose() is called before animation playback in the PlayAnimation method, not immediately after skin changes.

content.text:
<observation>
  <type>discovery</type>
  <title>Examined Spine import pattern and setSkin usage conventions</title>
  <subtitle>Codebase imports sp from 'cc' package; setSkin called standalone without immediate setup pose reset, while setToSetupPose precedes animation playback</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>Spine module (sp) imported from 'cc' package via destructured import alongside Component, _decorator, and other Cocos framework types</fact>
    <fact>BigWinControll.ts line 1: import { Component, Label, sp, _decorator, CCFloat } from "cc"</fact>
    <fact>MysteryCashSpine.ts line 1: import { _decorator, Component, Enum, Label, Node, sp } from 'cc'</fact>
    <fact>BigWinControll setSkin() call at line 207 stands alone without setSlotsToSetupPose or setToSetupPose afterward</fact>
    <fact>setToSetupPose() called at line 344 within PlayAnimation method before setAnimation(), separate timing from skin changes</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Investigated Spine API usage patterns to inform FeatureWheelManager implementation. The codebase imports the sp (Spine) module from the 'cc' package using destructured imports alongside other Cocos Creator framework types like Component and _decorator. Examination of setSkin usage in BigWinControll reveals that setSkin() is called standalone (line 207) without immediate setup pose reset calls. The setToSetupPose() call appears separately in the PlayAnimation method (line 344) immediately before setAnimation(), as part of the animation playback sequence rather than skin switching. This pattern indicates setSkin() does not require accompanying pose reset calls—the reset happens as part of animation playback initialization. This convention will guide the FeatureWheelManager implementation: setSkin() can be called directly when switching feature type visuals, while setToSetupPose() should precede setAnimation() calls in the PlayActive/PlayOut/PlayIdle animation methods.</narrative>

    <concept>pattern</concept>
  </concepts>

    <fact>ApplyResultSprite (line 417) maps FeatureWheelSegmentType to SpriteChange icon index using TypeToIconIndex, showing/hiding result node</fact>
    <fact>HideResult (line 431) event handler hides result display node when HIDE_RESULT event dispatched</fact>
    <fact>ResumeIdle (line 457) event handler resumes idle rotation after PlaySpin completes and other stage effects finish, triggered by RESUME_IDLE event</fact>
    <fact>PlaySpin includes m_isSpinning reentry guard (line 324) preventing concurrent spins</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Examined the current FeatureWheelManager workflow to understand how result display integrates with spin mechanics. PlaySpin orchestrates the complete spin sequence: validates preconditions (not spinning, initialized, valid index), executes rotation animation, then calls PlayLandAnnounce to show the result. PlayLandAnnounce currently displays result cards by calling ApplyResultSprite twice—once for the result symbol sprite and once for the background sprite—using TypeToIconIndex to map the segment type to SpriteChange icon indices. The result display remains visible until the caller dispatches HIDE_RESULT event, triggering HideResult to hide the node. After external stage effects complete, RESUME_IDLE event triggers ResumeIdle to restart idle rotation. This architecture will be modified: PlayLandAnnounce will switch from ApplyResultSprite (result cards) to setSkin() + Collect animation (middle-segment highlight), HideResult becomes obsolete (Out animation replaces it), and ResumeIdle will trigger PlayIdle Spine animation instead of mechanical rotation. The m_isSpinning guard and callback mechanism remain unchanged, preserving existing integration points.</narrative>

m_clockwise 單向單調，不沿用會反向的 angleDiff）\\n     */\\n    private RotateToIndex(landIndex: number): Promise<void> {\\n        return new Promise<void>((resolve) => {\\n            if (!this.m_wheelNode || ComputeTargetAngle(landIndex, currentAngle, this.m_clockwise);\\n            const anim = { angle: currentAngle };\\n            tween(anim)\\n                .to(FeatureWheelManager.ROTATE_TIME, {    }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 顯示/隱藏 UI（IF-4）\\n     */\\n    private SetUIShow(isShow: boolean) {\\n        if (this.m_rootNode) {\\n            this.m_rootNode.active = isShow;\\n        }\\n        // 隱藏 UI 時一併收掉結果展示牌，避免下次顯示殘留上一輪落點符號\\n        if (!isShow) {\\n            this.HideResult();\\n        }\\n        // Idle：顯示時開始緩轉、隱藏時停止（PlaySpin 後不自動恢復，須由 RESUME_IDLE 手動恢復）\\n content.thinking:
The user is modifying FeatureWheelManager.ts to add Spine animation support. This edit adds:

1. `sp` to the imports from 'cc'
2. `TypeToSkin` and `BIG_WHEEL_DEFAULT_SKIN` to the imports from FeatureWheelTypes
3. A new constant `BIG_WHEEL_ANIM` that defines the animation names for the BigWheel Spine animations (Active, Collect, Out, Idle)

This is setting up the infrastructure needed to implement Spine-based animations in the FeatureWheelManager.

content.text:
<observation>
  <type>feature</type>
  <title>Added Spine imports and animation name constants to FeatureWheelManager</title>
  <subtitle>Imported sp module, TypeToSkin/BIG_WHEEL_DEFAULT_SKIN from types, and defined BIG_WHEEL_ANIM constant mapping animation phases</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>Added sp (Spine module) to 'cc' package imports alongside existing Component, Node, Label, tween imports</fact>
    <fact>Imported TypeToSkin function and BIG_WHEEL_DEFAULT_SKIN constant from FeatureWheelTypes module</fact>
    <fact>Defined BIG_WHEEL_ANIM constant object with four animation names: Active (entry/descent), Collect (middle feature highlight), Out (exit/return), Idle (breathing standby)</fact>
    <fact>BIG_WHEEL_ANIM uses 'as const' assertion for type-safe string literal access</fact>
    <fact>Animation names documented inline: Active=進場(盤面下降+灰塵+光效), Collect=落點中間功能亮起, Out=退場(盤面回歸+功能暗掉), Idle=待機呼吸</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Prepared FeatureWheelManager for Spine animation integration by adding required imports and constants. Added sp module import from 'cc' package following established codebase pattern (destructured alongside other Cocos framework types). Imported TypeToSkin and BIG_WHEEL_DEFAULT_SKIN from FeatureWheelTypes to support dynamic skin switching based on segment type. Defined BIG_WHEEL_ANIM constant object mapping the four animation phases: Active for wheel entry with descent/dust/light effects, Collect for middle-segment feature highlighting when a result is shown, Out for wheel exit with return animation and feature dimming, and Idle for breathing standby animation. The constant uses 'as const' assertion to provide type-safe access to animation name strings throughout the implementation. This establishes the infrastructure for replacing the current result card display system (ApplyResultSprite) with Spine skin switching and animation playback (setSkin + setAnimation).</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>what-changed</concept>
    <concept>how-it-works</concept>
  </concepts>
  <files_read>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>assets/Script/FeatureWheel/FeatureWheelManager.ts</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>

content.thinking:
The user is adding two new events to the FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT constant:
1. PLAY_ENTER - for playing the Active (entry) animation 
2. PLAY_EXIT - for playing the Out (exit) animation

Both events accept an optional callback parameter that gets called when the animation completes. The comments note that if the Spine animation is missing, the callback should be invoked immediately to avoid hanging.

These events are being added to support the Spine-based animation system that will replace the current result card display system.

content.text:
<observation>
  <type>feature</type>
  <title>Added PLAY_ENTER and PLAY_EXIT events for Spine session boundary animations</title>
  <subtitle>New events trigger Active entry animation before first spin and Out exit animation after all spins complete, with optional completion callbacks</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>Added PLAY_ENTER event for playing Active animation (wheel descent with dust and light effects) once per round before first spin</fact>
    <fact>Added PLAY_EXIT event for playing Out animation (wheel return with middle feature dimming) once per round after all spins and effects complete</fact>
    <fact>Both events accept optional callback parameter: () => void invoked when animation playback finishes</fact>
    <fact>Event documentation specifies fallback behavior: if Spine animation missing, callback invoked immediately to prevent hang</fact>
    <fact>Events positioned between HIDE_UI and RESUME_IDLE in FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT constant definition</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Added session boundary animation events to FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT constant for controlling Spine-based wheel entry and exit animations. PLAY_ENTER triggers the Active animation showing the wheel descending with dust and light effects, played once per round before the first spin. PLAY_EXIT triggers the Out animation showing the wheel returning to rest position with middle-segment features dimming, played once per round after all spins and stage effects complete. Both events support optional completion callbacks to enable sequential orchestration in FeatureWheelShowState. The documentation explicitly specifies defensive callback behavior: if the Spine animation is missing or fails to load, callbacks must be invoked immediately to prevent the calling state from hanging indefinitely. These events establish the integration points for the session-level Active/Out animations that will bracket the existing per-spin rotation and Collect animations, implementing the proposed architecture where Active plays once on OnEnter and Out plays once after the spin loop completes.</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>what-changed</concept>
    <concept>how-it-works</concept>
  </concepts>
  <files_read>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>assets/Script/FeatureWheel/FeatureWheelManager.ts</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>

})\\n    private m_segmentValueLabels: Label[] = [];\\n\\n    /**@ch 12 格落點演出節點（順序對應格 0~11；現僅供 DevAssertConfig 數量檢查，落點演出已改用結果展示牌）*/\\n    @property({ type: [Node], displayName: '12 格落點演出節點' })\\n    private m_segmentNodes: Node[] = [];\\n\\n    /**@ch 結果展示牌根節點（暫代落點演出：顯示落點 feature 符號；退場由 HIDE_RESULT 事件觸發）*/\\n    @property({ type: Node, displayName: '結果展示牌根節點' })\\n    private m_resultNode: Node = null;\\n\\n    /**@ch 結果展示牌符號 SpriteChange（5 張圖索引對齊 TYPE_ICON_CONFIG，與 12 格 icon 同套索引）*/\\n    @property({ type: SpriteChange, displayName: '結果展示牌符號 SpriteChange' })\\n    private m_resultSpriteChange: SpriteChange = null;\\n\\n    /**@ch 結果展示牌背景 SpriteChange（背景隨落點 type 切換；5 張圖索引同 m_resultSpriteChange）*/\\n    @property({ type: SpriteChange, displayName: '結果展示牌背景 SpriteChange' })\\n    private m_resultBgSpriteChange: SpriteChange = null;\\n\\n    /**@ch 轉動方向：勾選=順時針，取消=逆時針（預設順時針）*/\\n    @property({ displayName: '順時針轉動' })\\n    private m_clockwise: boolean = true;\\n\\n    /**@ch Idle 緩轉一圈秒數（越大越慢；≤0 視為不緩轉）；方向跟隨「順時針轉動」*/\\n    @property({ displayName: 'Idle 一圈秒數' })\\n    private m_idleSecondsPerRev: number = 60;\\n    //#endregion 屬性\\n\\n    //#region 常數\\n    /**@ch 轉動時間（秒）；拉長以降低峰值角速度，減輕 12 格重複圖樣的車輪錯覺（視覺反向）*/\\n    private static readonly ROTATE_TIME = 3;//2.5;\\n    //#endregion 常數\\n\\n    //#region 變數\\n    /**@ch 遊戲視窗*/\\n    private m_gameView: GameView = null;\\n    /**@ch 是否初始化*/\\n    private m_isInit = false;\\n    /**@ch 是否轉動中（轉動中/閒置兩互斥態）*/\\n    private m_isSpinning = false;\\n    /**@ch 是否處於 Idle 緩轉態（SHOW_UI/RESUME_IDLE 開、HIDE_UI/PlaySpin 關；轉動中由 m_isSpinning 暫停，轉完不自動恢復）*/\\n    private m_isIdle = false;\\n    /**@ch 是否已註冊事件*/\\n    private m_isEventRegistered = false;\\n    /**@ch 當前 12 格資料*/\\n    private m_segments: SegmentDescriptor[] = [];\\n\\n    /**@ch 事件列表*/\\n    private readonly EVENT_LIST: string[] = [\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.INIT,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SET_WHEEL_DATA,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_SPIN,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SHOW_UI,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_UI,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_ENTER,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_EXIT,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.RESUME_IDLE,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_RESULT,\\n    ];\\n    //#endregion 變數\\n\\n    //#region 生命週期\\n    onLoad() {\\n        this.RegisterEvent();\\n        this.DevAssertConfig();\\n        this.RegisterTestKeyCodes();\\n    }\\n\\n    onDestroy() {\\n        this.UnregisterEvent();\\n        this.UnregisterTestKeyCodes();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 每幀 Idle 緩轉：僅在 Idle 態且非轉動中執行（兩旋轉路徑互斥，不同幀寫 m_wheelNode）\\n     * 方向跟隨 m_clockwise（順時針 = z 遞減，與 ComputeTargetAngle 一致）\\n     */\\n    update(dt: number) {\\n        if (!this.m_isIdle || this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (this.m_idleSecondsPerRev <= 0) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (!this.m_wheelNode || !this.m_wheelNode.isValid) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        const dir = this.m_clockwise ? -1 : 1;\\n        const deltaAngle = dir * (360 / this.m_idleSecondsPerRev) * dt;\\n        // 正規化防 BC-8 連續累積漂移（與 RotateToIndex 收尾一致），spin 起點讀 currentAngle 仍正確\\n        const next = NormalizeAngle(this.m_wheelNode.eulerAngles.z + deltaAngle);\\n        this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, next);\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 生命週期\\n\\n    //#region 事件註冊\\n    private RegisterEvent() {\\n        if (this.m_isEventRegistered) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.m_isEventRegistered = true;\\n        this.EVENT_LIST.forEach(event => eventManager.Register(event, this));\\n    }\\n\\n    private UnregisterEvent() {\\n        if (!this.m_isEventRegistered) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.EVENT_LIST.forEach(event => eventManager.UnRegister(event, this));\\n        this.m_isEventRegistered = false;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 事件分派\\n     */\\n    OnEvent(event: string, ...args: any[]) {\\n        switch (event) {\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.INIT:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && typeof args[0] === 'object' && args[0] !== null) {\\n                    this.Init(args[0]);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel INIT 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SET_WHEEL_DATA:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && Array.isArray(args[0])) {\\n                    this.SetWheelData(args[0]);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel SET_WHEEL_DATA 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_SPIN:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && typeof args[0] === 'number') {\\n                    this.PlaySpin(args[0], typeof args[1] === 'function' ? args[1] : undefined);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel PLAY_SPIN 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SHOW_UI:\\n                this.SetUIShow(true);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_UI:\\n                this.SetUIShow(false);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.RESUME_IDLE:\\n                this.ResumeIdle();\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_RESULT:\\n                this.HideResult();\\n                break;\\n        }\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 事件註冊\\n\\n    //#region 方法\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 初始化（IF-1）\\n     */\\n    private Init(gameView: GameView) {\\n        this.m_gameView = gameView;\\n        this.m_isInit = true;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設置 12 格資料並更新 icon（IF-2 / BC-5 / EH-2）\\n     * @param segments server 給的 12 格資料\\n     */\\n    private SetWheelData(segments: SegmentDescriptor[]) {\\n        // BC-9 行為約束：轉動中拒絕換資料，避免落點與顯示不一致\\n        if (this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel SetWheelData 轉動中，拒絕本次設置');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (!segments) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel SetWheelData 資料為空');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        // EH-2：長度 > 12 取前 12\\n        if (segments.length > FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel SetWheelData 長度 ${segments.length} > ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}，取前 ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT} 格`);\\n        }\\n        this.m_segments = segments.slice(0, FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT);\\n\\n        // EH-2：長度 < 12 → 渲染已提供格，其餘格保持預設\\n        if (this.m_segments.length < FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel SetWheelData 長度 ${this.m_segments.length} < ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}，其餘格保持預設`);\\n        }\\n\\n        this.BindSegmentIcons();\\n\\n        this.m_isIdle = true;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 依當前資料綁定各格 icon（BC-4 / EH-2）\\n     * None / 無資料格 → 清空不顯示；其餘依 type 換圖。倍率值已移除，Label 一律清空防殘留。\\n     * FS_BG 底圖：僅該格 type 為 FreeGame 時開啟（作底凸顯免費遊戲符號）；其餘格關閉以保冪等（R-2）。\\n     */\\n    private BindSegmentIcons() {\\n        // 迭代固定 12 格確保冪等（R-2）：二次設定變少時，超出資料的格重置為預設，不殘留舊值\\n        for (let i = 0; i < FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT; i++) {\\n            const seg = i < this.m_segments.length ? this.m_segments[i] : null;\\n\\n            // 換 icon：None / 無資料格 → 清空（暫不顯示）；其餘依 type 換圖（BC-4）\\n            const spriteChange = this.m_segmentSpriteChanges[i];\\n            if (spriteChange) {\\n                if (!seg || seg.type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.None) {\\n                    spriteChange.ClearSprite();\\n                } else {\\n                    spriteChange.ChangeSpriteByIndex(TypeToIconIndex(seg.type));\\n                }\\n\\n                // FS_BG 底圖：與 icon 同生命週期，從同格 item root 取子節點（無資料/非 FreeGame 一律關，保冪等）\\n                const fsBg = spriteChange.node?.getChildByName('FS_BG');\\n                if (fsBg) {\\n                    fsBg.active = !!seg && seg.type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.FreeGame;\\n                }\\n            }\\n\\n            // 倍率值已移除：清空 Label，避免殘留設計期/前一次的文字\\n            const label = this.m_segmentValueLabels[i];\\n            if (label) {\\n                label.string = '';\\n            }\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 轉動並落在指定格（IF-3 / BC-3 / BC-6 / BC-7 / BC-8 / BC-9 / EH-1 / EH-3）\\n     * 守衛順序（DR-10）：① 轉動中重入 → ② 未初始化/無資料 → ③ landIndex 範圍\\n     * 完成訊號鏈（DR-2 / BC-7）：await 轉動 → await 落點演出 → callback → 最後釋放 m_isSpinning\\n     * @param landIndex 落點格索引 (0~11)\\n     * @param callback 完成回調，帶選中格 {index, type, value}\\n     */\\n    private async PlaySpin(landIndex: number, callback?: (result: SpinResult) => void) {\\n        // ① BC-9 轉動中重入 → 忽略\\n        if (this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 轉動中，忽略本次請求');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // ② EH-3 未初始化或無資料\\n        if (!this.m_isInit || this.m_segments.length === 0) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 未初始化或尚未設置輪盤資料');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // ③ EH-1 landIndex 範圍\\n        if (landIndex < 0 || landIndex >= FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel PlaySpin landIndex ${landIndex} 超出範圍 0~${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT - 1}`);\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        this.m_isSpinning = true;\\n        // 轉動開始即關閉 Idle：轉完「不」自動恢復；待盤面其他表演結束由 RESUME_IDLE 手動恢復\\n        this.m_isIdle = false;\\n        try {\\n            await this.RotateToIndex(landIndex);     // BC-3 / BC-6\\n            await this.PlayLandAnnounce(landIndex);  // BC-7\\n            const seg = this.m_segments[landIndex];\\n            // callback 包獨立 try（R-1）：呼叫端 callback 自身例外不被遮蔽成「轉動失敗」\\n            try {\\n                callback?.({ index: landIndex, type: seg.type });\\n            } catch (cbErr) {\\n                error('FeatureWheel PlaySpin callback 執行失敗: ' + cbErr);\\n            }\\n        } catch (e) {\\n            error('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 轉動/演出失敗: ' + e);\\n        } finally {\\n            // BC-7：釋放點在 callback 之後，避免演出/回呼期間被重入\\n            this.m_isSpinning = false;\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 旋轉到 landIndex，停在頂端指針（BC-3 / BC-6）\\n     * 角度計算用 ComputeTargetAngle（依 m_clockwise 單向單調，不沿用會反向的 angleDiff）\\n     */\\n    private RotateToIndex(landIndex: number): Promise<void> {\\n        return new Promise<void>((resolve) => {\\n            if (!this.m_wheelNode || !this.m_wheelNode.isValid) {\\n                resolve();\\n                return;\\n            }\\n            const currentAngle = this.m_wheelNode.eulerAngles.z;\\n            const targetAngle = ComputeTargetAngle(landIndex, currentAngle, this.m_clockwise);\\n            const anim = { angle: currentAngle };\\n            tween(anim)\\n                .to(FeatureWheelManager.ROTATE_TIME, { angle: targetAngle }, {\\n                    easing: 'cubicOut',\\n                    onUpdate: () => {\\n                        if (this.m_wheelNode?.isValid) {\\n                            this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, anim.angle);\\n                        }\\n                    },\\n                })\\n                .call(() => {\\n                    // DR-9：轉動結束後正規化角度，防 BC-8 連續轉動累積漂移\\n                    if (this.m_wheelNode?.isValid) {\\n                        this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, NormalizeAngle(targetAngle));\\n                    }\\n                    resolve();\\n                })\\n                .start();\\n        });\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 落點演出（暫代）：用結果展示牌秀出落點 feature 符號，秀出即 resolve（不等退場）\\n     * ⚠️ BC-7 語意調整（暫代）：原「演出完成才 resolve」改為「秀出展示牌即 resolve」；\\n     *    展示牌停留至呼叫端 dispatch HIDE_RESULT 才退場（PlaySpin 完成後 m_isSpinning 會在展示牌仍顯示時釋放）\\n     * 符號索引複用 BindSegmentIcons 同套 TypeToIconIndex（None → 清空）\\n     */\\n    private PlayLandAnnounce(landIndex: number): Promise<void> {\\n        return new Promise<void>((resolve) => {\\n            const seg = this.m_segments[landIndex];\\n            if (!seg || !this.m_resultNode || !this.m_resultNode.isValid) {\\n                resolve();\\n                return;\\n            }\\n            // 符號與背景同步切換（同套 TypeToIconIndex；None → 清空）\\n            this.ApplyResultSprite(this.m_resultSpriteChange, seg.type);\\n            this.ApplyResultSprite(this.m_resultBgSpriteChange, seg.type);\\n            this.m_resultNode.active = true;\\n            resolve();\\n        });\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 套用落點 type 對應圖到指定 SpriteChange（None → 清空；其餘依 TypeToIconIndex 換圖）\\n     * 給結果展示牌的符號與背景共用，確保兩者索引邏輯一致\\n     */\\n    private ApplyResultSprite(spriteChange: SpriteChange | null, type: FeatureWheelSegmentType) {\\n        if (!spriteChange) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.None) {\\n            spriteChange.ClearSprite();\\n        } else {\\n            spriteChange.ChangeSpriteByIndex(TypeToIconIndex(type));\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 隱藏結果展示牌（HIDE_RESULT 退場；暫代落點演出的收場）\\n     */\\n    private HideResult() {\\n        if (this.m_resultNode && this.m_resultNode.isValid) {\\n            this.m_resultNode.active = false;\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 顯示/隱藏 UI（IF-4）\\n     */\\n    private SetUIShow(isShow: boolean) {\\n        if (this.m_rootNode) {\\n            this.m_rootNode.active = isShow;\\n        }\\n        // 隱藏 UI 時一併收掉結果展示牌，避免下次顯示殘留上一輪落點符號\\n        if (!isShow) {\\n            this.HideResult();\\n        }\\n        // Idle：顯示時開始緩轉、隱藏時停止（PlaySpin 後不自動恢復，須由 RESUME_IDLE 手動恢復）\\n        this.m_isIdle = isShow;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 手動恢復 Idle 緩轉（IF）\\n     * 用途：PlaySpin 後輪盤停住，呼叫端在盤面其他表演結束後觸發此方法才續轉\\n     * 注意：若仍在轉動中，由 update 的 m_isSpinning 守衛延後至轉完才實際緩轉\\n     */\\n    private ResumeIdle() {\\n        this.m_isIdle = true;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch dev-only 設定斷言（DR-3/DR-12 緩解：驗節點數量，順序語意仍須人工核對 prefab）\\n     */\\n    private DevAssertConfig() {\\n        if (!DEV) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (this.m_segmentSpriteChanges.length !== FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel 設定異常：SpriteChange 數 ${this.m_segmentSpriteChanges.length} ≠ ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}`);\\n        }\\n        if (this.m_segmentNodes.length !== FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel 設定異常：落點節點數 ${this.m_segmentNodes.length} ≠ ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}`);\\n        }\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 方法\\n\\n    //#region 測試功能\\n    /**@ch 測試用：當前轉動落點索引（每次轉動 +1 循環 0~11）*/\\n    private m_testLandIndex = 0;\\n    /**@ch 測試用：當前 UI 顯示狀態（給 DIGIT_4 切換）*/\\n    private m_testUIShown = false;\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 註冊測試按鍵（僅 DEBUG 構建生效；正式構建零副作用）\\n     */\\n    private RegisterTestKeyCodes() {\\n        if (!DEBUG) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // input.on(Input.EventType.KEY_DOWN, this.CheckTestKeyCode, this);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 取消註冊測試按鍵（與 RegisterTestKeyCodes 對稱，避免監聽洩漏）\\n     */\\n    private UnregisterTestKeyCodes() {\\n        if (!DEBUG) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // input.off(Input.EventType.KEY_DOWN, this.CheckTestKeyCode, this);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 檢查測試按鍵，走真實 eventManager 事件路徑驗證 FeatureWheel 功能\\n     * DIGIT_1：初始化 + 設定預設輪盤資料 + 顯示 UI（一鍵就緒）\\n     * DIGIT_2：轉動到下一格（循環 0~11）並印出落點結果（驗證旋轉/落點演出/callback）\\n     * DIGIT_3：重設隨機輪盤資料（驗證 icon 與乘倍數值動態更新）\\n     * DIGIT_4：切換顯示/隱藏 UI\\n     */\\n    private CheckTestKeyCode(event: EventKeyboard) {\\n        switch (event.keyCode) {\\n            // case KeyCode.DIGIT_1:\\n            //     log('[FeatureWheel 測試] 初始化 + 設定預設資料 + 顯示 UI');\\n            //     // INIT 僅需非 null 物件以通過參數驗證並翻起 m_isInit；\\n            //     // m_gameView 在本元件未被讀取，測試以 this.node 佔位即可\\n            //     eventManager.Dispatch(FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.INIT, this.node);\\n            //     eventManager.Dispatch(FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SET_WHEEL_DATA, GetDefaultSegments());\\n            //     eventManager.Dispatch(FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SHOW_UI);\\n            //     break;\\n\\n            case KeyCode.DIGIT_2: {\\n                const landIndex = this.m_testLandIndex % FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT;\\n                this.m_testLandIndex++;\\n                log(`[FeatureWheel 測試] 轉動到第 ${landIndex} 格`);\\n                eventManager.Dispatch(FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_SPIN, landIndex, (result: SpinResult) => {\\n                    log(`[FeatureWheel 測試] 落點結果 index=${result.index} type=${result.type}`);\\n                });\\n                break;\\n            }\\n            \\n            case KeyCode.DIGIT_3:\\n                log('[FeatureWheel 測試] 恢復 Idle 緩轉');\\n                eventManager.Dispatch(FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_RESULT);\\n                eventManager.Dispatch( FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.RESUME_IDLE );\\n                break;\\n\\n            case The user is continuing to make edits to the FeatureWheelManager.ts file. They've:

content.text:
<observation>
  <type>feature</type>
  <title>Wired PLAY_ENTER and PLAY_EXIT event handlers in event system</title>
  <subtitle>Added new events to registration list and OnEvent dispatcher with callback extraction for PlayEnter and PlayExit methods</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>Added FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_ENTER and FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_EXIT to EVENT_LIST array for event manager registration</fact>
    <fact>Implemented PLAY_ENTER case in OnEvent() switch calling PlayEnter() with extracted optional callback from args[0]</fact>
    <fact>Implemented PLAY_EXIT case in OnEvent() switch calling PlayExit() with extracted optional callback from args[0]</fact>
    <fact>Both event handlers use typeof guard (typeof args[0] === 'function') to safely extract callback or pass undefined</fact>
    <fact>Event handler placement maintains logical flow: after HIDE_UI, before RESUME_IDLE, matching EVENT_LIST order</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Completed event system wiring for Spine session boundary animations by adding PLAY_ENTER and PLAY_EXIT events to the registration list and implementing their OnEvent dispatcher cases. Both events are now registered with eventManager on component load and unregistered on destroy. The OnEvent switch handles both events by extracting optional callback functions from the first argument using typeof guards, then delegating to PlayEnter() and PlayExit() methods (to be implemented). This callback extraction pattern matches the existing PLAY_SPIN event handler, providing consistent parameter handling. The event handlers are positioned logically in the switch statement following HIDE_UI and preceding RESUME_IDLE, maintaining the same order as the EVENT_LIST array and FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT constant definition. This infrastructure enables FeatureWheelShowState to dispatch PLAY_ENTER before the first spin and PLAY_EXIT after all spins complete, with optional callbacks for sequential orchestration.</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>what-changed</concept>
    <concept>how-it-works</concept>
  </concepts>

  </files_read>

    <file>assets/Script/FeatureWheel/FeatureWheelManager.ts</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>

   ];\\n    //#endregion 變數\\n\\n    //#region 生命週期\\n    onLoad() {\\n        this.RegisterEvent();\\n        this.DevAssertConfig();\\n        this.RegisterTestKeyCodes();\\n    }\\n\\n    }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 顯示/隱藏 UI（IF-4）\\n     */\\n    private SetUIShow(isShow: boolean) {\\n        if (this.m_rootNode) {\\n            this.m_rootNode.active = isShow;\\n        }\\n        // 隱藏 UI 時一併收掉結果展示牌，避免下次顯示殘留上一輪落點符號\\n        if (!isShow) {\\n            this.HideResult();\\n        }\\n        // Idle：顯示時開始緩轉、隱藏時停止（PlaySpin 後不自動恢復，須由 RESUME_IDLE 手動恢復）\\n 1. First edit added m_bigWheelSpine property (sp.Skeleton type) with a comment explaining it's for EyeStrike2_BigWheel animations (Active/Collect/Out/Idle), Collect replaces result cards, and m_result* properties are kept only to avoid prefab deserialization warnings.

2. Second read is examining the area around PlayLandAnnounce and ApplyResultSprite to understand the current implementation before modifying it.

This is setting up the infrastructure to implement the Spine animation methods. The m_bigWheelSpine property is the reference to the Spine component that will play the Active/Collect/Out/Idle animations.

I should create an observation about adding the m_bigWheelSpine property.

content.text:
<observation>
  <type>feature</type>
  <title>Added BigWheel Spine skeleton property to FeatureWheelManager</title>
  <subtitle>New m_bigWheelSpine property references EyeStrike2_BigWheel skeleton for Active/Collect/Out/Idle animations replacing result card system</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>Added m_bigWheelSpine property typed as sp.Skeleton with @property decorator and 'BigWheel Spine' display name</fact>
    <fact>Property documentation specifies animations: Active (entry), Collect (landing highlight), Out (exit), Idle (breathing standby)</fact>
    <fact>Comment notes Collect animation replaces result card display (m_resultNode/m_resultSpriteChange/m_resultBgSpriteChange)</fact>
    <fact>Existing m_result* properties retained to avoid prefab deserialization warnings despite being functionally superseded</fact>
    <fact>Property positioned after result card properties and before m_clockwise configuration property in attributes section</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Added the m_bigWheelSpine property to FeatureWheelManager for Spine animation integration. This sp.Skeleton reference will control the EyeStrike2_BigWheel Spine component, playing four animation phases: Active for wheel entry with descent/dust/light effects, Collect for middle-segment feature highlighting when landing on a result (replacing the current result card popup system), Out for wheel exit with return animation and feature dimming, and Idle for breathing standby animation. The documentation explicitly notes that Collect replaces the existing result card display mechanism (ApplyResultSprite calls manipulating m_resultNode/m_resultSpriteChange/m_resultBgSpriteChange), though these properties are retained to prevent Cocos Creator prefab deserialization warnings when the prefab still references them. This property will be the central reference for all Spine animation playback methods (PlayEnter, PlayExit, modified PlayLandAnnounce, and modified ResumeIdle) that will be implemented next. The placement after result card properties and before configuration properties maintains logical grouping of UI element references in the attributes section.</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>what-changed</concept>
    <concept>how-it-works</concept>
  </concepts>
  <files_read>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>assets/Script/FeatureWheel/FeatureWheelManager.ts</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>

content.thinking:
This is a significant change - the PlayLandAnnounce method has been completely rewritten to use Spine animations instead of the result card display. Let me capture the key aspects:

1. **Old behavior**: Displayed result cards using ApplyResultSprite on m_resultSpriteChange and m_resultBgSpriteChange, then showed m_resultNode
2. **New behavior**: Calls SetSpineSkin() with TypeToSkin(seg.type) to switch the skin, then plays the Collect animation via PlaySpineOnce()

Key changes:
- Method now async (was Promise-based before but now uses async/await)
- Removed result node/sprite display logic entirely
- Calls SetSpineSkin() and PlaySpineOnce() - two helper methods that haven't been implemented yet
- Documentation updated to explain the timing: wheel stops, then middle feature lights up via Collect animation
- Notes that Collect animation's end pose keeps the feature lit until PlayExit's Out animation dims it
- Guards against Spine being unbound - PlaySpineOnce will resolve immediately to prevent hanging

This is the core replacement logic that switches from the old result card popup to the new Spine-based middle-segment highlight animation system.

content.text:
<observation>
  <type>feature</type>
  <title>Rewrote PlayLandAnnounce to use Spine Collect animation instead of result cards</title>
  <subtitle>Replaced result card popup system with Spine skin switching and Collect animation playback for middle-segment feature highlighting</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>PlayLandAnnounce converted from Promise constructor pattern to async/await for cleaner control flow</fact>
    <fact>Removed all result card display logic: ApplyResultSprite calls, m_resultNode.active manipulation, and result node/sprite guards</fact>
    <fact>New implementation calls SetSpineSkin(TypeToSkin(seg.type)) to switch skin based on landed segment type, then PlaySpineOnce(BIG_WHEEL_ANIM.Collect)</fact>
    <fact>Documentation updated: explains Collect animation plays middle-segment feature lighting after wheel stops, end pose holds lit state until PlayExit's Out animation dims it</fact>
    <fact>Defensive design: if m_bigWheelSpine unbound, PlaySpineOnce resolves immediately preventing caller hang (matches established pattern from event documentation)</fact>
    <fact>Timing preserved: called after RotateToIndex completes in PlaySpin workflow, maintaining "wheel stops then feature lights" sequence</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Completely replaced PlayLandAnnounce implementation from result card popup system to Spine-based animation. The old logic displayed static sprite-based result cards by calling ApplyResultSprite on m_resultSpriteChange and m_resultBgSpriteChange, then activating m_resultNode. The new implementation dynamically switches the BigWheel Spine's skin using SetSpineSkin(TypeToSkin(seg.type)) to match the landed feature type (Multiplier→"Multiplier", Upgrade→"Upgrade", SymbolConvert→"default" temporarily, FreeGame/GrandJP/None→"default"), then awaits PlaySpineOnce(BIG_WHEEL_ANIM.Collect) to play the middle-segment lighting animation. This fulfills BC-7 by awaiting animation completion before resolving, restoring the original "演出完成才 resolve" semantic that was temporarily compromised in the result card implementation. The Collect animation's end pose holds the lit feature state until the session-level PlayExit triggers the Out animation to dim it and return the wheel to rest. The method signature remains identical (called from PlaySpin after RotateToIndex), preserving the established timing sequence. Defensive handling ensures if m_bigWheelSpine is unbound, PlaySpineOnce will immediately resolve rather than hang the caller. This change depends on two helper methods (SetSpineSkin and PlaySpineOnce) that will be implemented next.</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>what-changed</concept>
    <concept>how-it-works</concept>
  </concepts>
  <files_read>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>assets/Script/FeatureWheel/FeatureWheelManager.ts</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>

緩轉、依 server 資料換 icon、轉動落在指定格、播落點演出、把選中功能拋給外部\\n * 不碰盤面標記/重轉/改符號（呼叫端責任）\\n */\\n@ccclass('FeatureWheelManager')\\nexport class FeatureWheelManager extends Component {\\n    //#region 屬性\\n    /**@ch SpriteChange（5 張圖索引對齊 TYPE_ICON_CONFIG，與 12 格 icon 同套索引）*/\\n    @property({ type: SpriteChange, displayName: '結果展示牌符號 SpriteChange' })\\n    private m_resultSpriteChange: SpriteChange = null;\\n\\n    /**@ch 結果展示牌背景 SpriteChange（背景隨落點 type 切換；5 張圖索引同 m_resultSpriteChange）*/\\n    @property({ type: SpriteChange, displayName: '結果展示牌背景 SpriteChange' })\\n    private m_resultBgSpriteChange:
