@property({ displayName: '順時針轉動' })\\n    private m_clockwise: boolean = true;\\n\\n    /**@ch Idle 緩轉一圈秒數（越大越慢；≤0 視為不緩轉）；方向跟隨「順時針轉動」*/\\n    @property({ displayName: 'Idle 一圈秒數' })\\n    private m_idleSecondsPerRev: number = 60;\\n    //#endregion 屬性\\n\\n    //#region 常數\\n    /**@ch 轉動時間（秒）；拉長以降低峰值角速度，減輕 12 格重複圖樣的車輪錯覺（視覺反向）*/\\n    private static readonly ROTATE_TIME = 3;//2.5;\\n    //#endregion 常數\\n\\n    //#region 變數\\n    /**@ch 遊戲視窗*/\\n    private m_gameView: GameView = null;\\n    /**@ch 是否初始化*/\\n    private m_isInit = false;\\n    /**@ch 是否轉動中（轉動中/閒置兩互斥態）*/\\n    private m_isSpinning = false;\\n    /**@ch 是否處於 Idle 緩轉態（SHOW_UI/RESUME_IDLE 開、HIDE_UI/PlaySpin 關；轉動中由 m_isSpinning 暫停，轉完不自動恢復）*/\\n    private m_isIdle = false;\\n    /**@ch 是否已註冊事件*/\\n    private m_isEventRegistered = false;\\n    /**@ch 當前 12 格資料*/\\n    private m_segments: SegmentDescriptor[] = [];\\n\\n    /**@ch 事件列表*/\\n    private readonly EVENT_LIST: string[] = [\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.INIT,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SET_WHEEL_DATA,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_SPIN,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SHOW_UI,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_UI,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_ENTER,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_EXIT,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.RESUME_IDLE,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_RESULT,\\n    ];\\n    //#endregion 變數\\n\\n    //#region 生命週期\\n    onLoad() {\\n        this.RegisterEvent();\\n        this.DevAssertConfig();\\n        this.RegisterTestKeyCodes();\\n    }\\n\\n    onDestroy() {\\n        this.UnregisterEvent();\\n        this.UnregisterTestKeyCodes();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 每幀 Idle 緩轉：僅在 Idle 態且非轉動中執行（兩旋轉路徑互斥，不同幀寫 m_wheelNode）\\n     * 方向跟隨 m_clockwise（順時針 = z 遞減，與 ComputeTargetAngle 一致）\\n     */\\n    update(dt: number) {\\n        if (!this.m_isIdle || this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (this.m_idleSecondsPerRev <= 0) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (!this.m_wheelNode || !this.m_wheelNode.isValid) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        const dir = this.m_clockwise ? -1 : 1;\\n        const deltaAngle = dir * (360 / this.m_idleSecondsPerRev) * dt;\\n        // 正規化防 BC-8 連續累積漂移（與 RotateToIndex 收尾一致），spin 起點讀 currentAngle 仍正確\\n        const next = NormalizeAngle(this.m_wheelNode.eulerAngles.z + deltaAngle);\\n        this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, next);\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 生命週期\\n\\n    //#region 事件註冊\\n    private RegisterEvent() {\\n        if (this.m_isEventRegistered) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.m_isEventRegistered = true;\\n        this.EVENT_LIST.forEach(event => eventManager.Register(event, this));\\n    }\\n\\n    private UnregisterEvent() {\\n        if (!this.m_isEventRegistered) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.EVENT_LIST.forEach(event => eventManager.UnRegister(event, this));\\n        this.m_isEventRegistered = false;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 事件分派\\n     */\\n    OnEvent(event: string, ...args: any[]) {\\n        switch (event) {\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.INIT:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && typeof args[0] === 'object' && args[0] !== null) {\\n                    this.Init(args[0]);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel INIT 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SET_WHEEL_DATA:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && Array.isArray(args[0])) {\\n                    this.SetWheelData(args[0]);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel SET_WHEEL_DATA 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_SPIN:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && typeof args[0] === 'number') {\\n                    this.PlaySpin(args[0], typeof args[1] === 'function' ? args[1] : undefined);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel PLAY_SPIN 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SHOW_UI:\\n                this.SetUIShow(true);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_UI:\\n                this.SetUIShow(false);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_ENTER:\\n                this.PlayEnter(typeof args[0] === 'function' ? args[0] : undefined);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_EXIT:\\n                this.PlayExit(typeof args[0] === 'function' ? args[0] : undefined);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.RESUME_IDLE:\\n                this.ResumeIdle();\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_RESULT:\\n                this.HideResult();\\n                break;\\n        }\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 事件註冊\\n\\n    //#region 方法\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 初始化（IF-1）\\n     */\\n    private Init(gameView: GameView) {\\n        this.m_gameView = gameView;\\n        this.m_isInit = true;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設置 12 格資料並更新 icon（IF-2 / BC-5 / EH-2）\\n     * @param segments server 給的 12 格資料\\n     */\\n    private SetWheelData(segments: SegmentDescriptor[]) {\\n        // BC-9 行為約束：轉動中拒絕換資料，避免落點與顯示不一致\\n        if (this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel SetWheelData 轉動中，拒絕本次設置');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (!segments) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel SetWheelData 資料為空');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        // EH-2：長度 > 12 取前 12\\n        if (segments.length > FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel SetWheelData 長度 ${segments.length} > ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}，取前 ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT} 格`);\\n        }\\n        this.m_segments = segments.slice(0, FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT);\\n\\n        // EH-2：長度 < 12 → 渲染已提供格，其餘格保持預設\\n        if (this.m_segments.length < FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel SetWheelData 長度 ${this.m_segments.length} < ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}，其餘格保持預設`);\\n        }\\n\\n        this.BindSegmentIcons();\\n\\n        this.m_isIdle = true;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 依當前資料綁定各格 icon（BC-4 / EH-2）\\n     * None / 無資料格 → 清空不顯示；其餘依 type 換圖。倍率值已移除，Label 一律清空防殘留。\\n     * FS_BG 底圖：僅該格 type 為 FreeGame 時開啟（作底凸顯免費遊戲符號）；其餘格關閉以保冪等（R-2）。\\n     */\\n    private BindSegmentIcons() {\\n        // 迭代固定 12 格確保冪等（R-2）：二次設定變少時，超出資料的格重置為預設，不殘留舊值\\n        for (let i = 0; i < FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT; i++) {\\n            const seg = i < this.m_segments.length ? this.m_segments[i] : null;\\n\\n            // 換 icon：None / 無資料格 → 清空（暫不顯示）；其餘依 type 換圖（BC-4）\\n            const spriteChange = this.m_segmentSpriteChanges[i];\\n            if (spriteChange) {\\n                if (!seg || seg.type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.None) {\\n                    spriteChange.ClearSprite();\\n                } else {\\n                    spriteChange.ChangeSpriteByIndex(TypeToIconIndex(seg.type));\\n                }\\n\\n                // FS_BG 底圖：與 icon 同生命週期，從同格 item root 取子節點（無資料/非 FreeGame 一律關，保冪等）\\n                const fsBg = spriteChange.node?.getChildByName('FS_BG');\\n                if (fsBg) {\\n                    fsBg.active = !!seg && seg.type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.FreeGame;\\n                }\\n            }\\n\\n            // 倍率值已移除：清空 Label，避免殘留設計期/前一次的文字\\n            const label = this.m_segmentValueLabels[i];\\n            if (label) {\\n                label.string = '';\\n            }\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 轉動並落在指定格（IF-3 / BC-3 / BC-6 / BC-7 / BC-8 / BC-9 / EH-1 / EH-3）\\n     * 守衛順序（DR-10）：① 轉動中重入 → ② 未初始化/無資料 → ③ landIndex 範圍\\n     * 完成訊號鏈（DR-2 / BC-7）：await 轉動 → await 落點演出 → callback → 最後釋放 m_isSpinning\\n     * @param landIndex 落點格索引 (0~11)\\n     * @param callback 完成回調，帶選中格 {index, type, value}\\n     */\\n    private async PlaySpin(landIndex: number, callback?: (result: SpinResult) => void) {\\n        // ① BC-9 轉動中重入 → 忽略\\n        if (this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 轉動中，忽略本次請求');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // ② EH-3 未初始化或無資料\\n        if (!this.m_isInit || this.m_segments.length === 0) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 未初始化或尚未設置輪盤資料');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // ③ EH-1 landIndex 範圍\\n        if (landIndex < 0 || landIndex >= FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel PlaySpin landIndex ${landIndex} 超出範圍 0~${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT - m_segmentSpriteChanges: SpriteChange[] = [];\\n\\n    /**@ch 12 格乘倍數值 Label（非乘倍格留空字串；順序對應格 0~11）*/\\n    @property({ type: [Label], displayName: '12 格乘倍數值 Label' })\\n    private m_segmentValueLabels: Label[] = [];\\n\\n    /**@ch 12 格落點演出節點（順序對應格 0~11；現僅供 DevAssertConfig 數量檢查，落點演出已改用結果展示牌）*/\\n    @property({ type: [Node], displayName: '12 格落點演出節點' })\\n    private m_segmentNodes: Node[] = [];\\n\\n    /**@ch 結果展示牌根節點（暫代落點演出：顯示落點 feature 符號；退場由 HIDE_RESULT 事件觸發）*/\\n    @property({ type: Node, displayName: '結果展示牌根節點' })\\n    private m_resultNode: Node = null;\\n\\n    /**@ch 結果展示牌符號 SpriteChange（5 張圖索引對齊 TYPE_ICON_CONFIG，與 12 格 icon 同套索引）*/\\n    @property({ type: SpriteChange, displayName: '結果展示牌符號 SpriteChange' })\\n    private m_resultSpriteChange: SpriteChange = null;\\n\\n    /**@ch 結果展示牌背景 SpriteChange（背景隨落點 type 切換；5 張圖索引同 m_resultSpriteChange）*/\\n    @property({ type: SpriteChange, displayName: '結果展示牌背景 SpriteChange' })\\n    private m_resultBgSpriteChange: SpriteChange = null;\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch BigWheel Spine（EyeStrike2_BigWheel）：進場 Active / 落點 Collect / 退場 Out / 待機 Idle，skin 依落點功能切換。\\n     * Collect 取代結果展示牌（m_result* 已停用，僅保留屬性避免 prefab 反序列化警告）。\\n     */\\n    @property({ type: sp.Skeleton, displayName: 'BigWheel Spine' })\\n    private m_bigWheelSpine: sp.Skeleton = null;\\n\\n    /**@ch 轉動方向：勾選=順時針，取消=逆時針（預設順時針）*/\\n    @property({ displayName: '順時針轉動' })\\n    private m_clockwise: boolean = true;\\n\\n    /**@ch Idle 緩轉一圈秒數（越大越慢；≤0 視為不緩轉）；方向跟隨「順時針轉動」*/\\n    @property({ displayName: 'Idle 一圈秒數' })\\n    private m_idleSecondsPerRev: number = 60;\\n    //#endregion 屬性\\n\\n    //#region 常數\\n    /**@ch 轉動時間（秒）；拉長以降低峰值角速度，減輕 12 格重複圖樣的車輪錯覺（視覺反向）*/\\n    private static readonly ROTATE_TIME = 3;//2.5;\\n    //#endregion 常數\\n\\n    //#region 變數\\n    /**@ch 遊戲視窗*/\\n    private m_gameView: GameView = null;\\n    /**@ch 是否初始化*/\\n    private m_isInit = false;\\n    /**@ch 是否轉動中（轉動中/閒置兩互斥態）*/\\n    private m_isSpinning = false;\\n    /**@ch 是否處於 Idle 緩轉態（SHOW_UI/RESUME_IDLE 開、HIDE_UI/PlaySpin 關；轉動中由 m_isSpinning 暫停，轉完不自動恢復）*/\\n    private m_isIdle = false;\\n    /**@ch 是否已註冊事件*/\\n    private m_isEventRegistered = false;\\n    /**@ch 當前 12 格資料*/\\n    private m_segments: SegmentDescriptor[] = [];\\n\\n    /**@ch 事件列表*/\\n    private readonly EVENT_LIST: string[] = [\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.INIT,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SET_WHEEL_DATA,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_SPIN,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SHOW_UI,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_UI,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_ENTER,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_EXIT,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.RESUME_IDLE,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_RESULT,\\n    ];\\n    //#endregion 變數\\n\\n    //#region 生命週期\\n    onLoad() {\\n        this.RegisterEvent();\\n        this.DevAssertConfig();\\n        this.RegisterTestKeyCodes();\\n    }\\n\\n    onDestroy() {\\n        this.UnregisterEvent();\\n        this.UnregisterTestKeyCodes();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 每幀 Idle 緩轉：僅在 Idle 態且非轉動中執行（兩旋轉路徑互斥，不同幀寫 m_wheelNode）\\n     * 方向跟隨 m_clockwise（順時針 = z 遞減，與 ComputeTargetAngle 一致）\\n     */\\n    update(dt: number) {\\n        if (!this.m_isIdle || this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (this.m_idleSecondsPerRev <= 0) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (!this.m_wheelNode || !this.m_wheelNode.isValid) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        const dir = this.m_clockwise ? -1 : 1;\\n        const deltaAngle = dir * (360 / this.m_idleSecondsPerRev) * dt;\\n        // 正規化防 BC-8 連續累積漂移（與 RotateToIndex 收尾一致），spin 起點讀 currentAngle 仍正確\\n        const next = NormalizeAngle(this.m_wheelNode.eulerAngles.z + deltaAngle);\\n        this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, next);\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 生命週期\\n\\n    //#region 事件註冊\\n    private RegisterEvent() {\\n        if (this.m_isEventRegistered) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.m_isEventRegistered = true;\\n        this.EVENT_LIST.forEach(event => eventManager.Register(event, this));\\n    }\\n\\n    private UnregisterEvent() {\\n        if (!this.m_isEventRegistered) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.EVENT_LIST.forEach(event => eventManager.UnRegister(event, this));\\n        this.m_isEventRegistered = false;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 事件分派\\n     */\\n    OnEvent(event: string, ...args: any[]) {\\n        switch (event) {\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.INIT:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && typeof args[0] === 'object' && args[0] !== null) {\\n                    this.Init(args[0]);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel INIT 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SET_WHEEL_DATA:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && Array.isArray(args[0])) {\\n                    this.SetWheelData(args[0]);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel SET_WHEEL_DATA 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_SPIN:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && typeof args[0] === 'number') {\\n                    this.PlaySpin(args[0], typeof args[1] === 'function' ? args[1] : undefined);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel PLAY_SPIN 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SHOW_UI:\\n                this.SetUIShow(true);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_UI:\\n                this.SetUIShow(false);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_ENTER:\\n                this.PlayEnter(typeof args[0] === 'function' ? args[0] : undefined);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_EXIT:\\n                this.PlayExit(typeof args[0] === 'function' ? args[0] : undefined);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.RESUME_IDLE:\\n                this.ResumeIdle();\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_RESULT:\\n                this.HideResult();\\n                break;\\n        }\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 事件註冊\\n\\n    //#region 方法\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 初始化（IF-1）\\n     */\\n    private Init(gameView: GameView) {\\n        this.m_gameView = gameView;\\n        this.m_isInit = true;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設置 12 格資料並更新 icon（IF-2 / BC-5 / EH-2）\\n     * @param segments server 給的 12 格資料\\n     */\\n    private SetWheelData(segments: SegmentDescriptor[]) {\\n        // BC-9 行為約束：轉動中拒絕換資料，避免落點與顯示不一致\\n        if (this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel SetWheelData 轉動中，拒絕本次設置');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (!segments) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel SetWheelData 資料為空');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        // EH-2：長度 > 12 取前 12\\n        if (segments.length > FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel SetWheelData 長度 ${segments.length} > ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}，取前 ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT} 格`);\\n        }\\n        this.m_segments = segments.slice(0, FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT);\\n\\n        // EH-2：長度 < 12 → 渲染已提供格，其餘格保持預設\\n        if (this.m_segments.length < FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel SetWheelData 長度 ${this.m_segments.length} < ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}，其餘格保持預設`);\\n        }\\n\\n        this.BindSegmentIcons();\\n\\n        this.m_isIdle = true;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 依當前資料綁定各格 icon（BC-4 / EH-2）\\n     * None / 無資料格 → 清空不顯示；其餘依 type 換圖。倍率值已移除，Label 一律清空防殘留。\\n     * FS_BG 底圖：僅該格 type 為 FreeGame 時開啟（作底凸顯免費遊戲符號）；其餘格關閉以保冪等（R-2）。\\n     */\\n    private BindSegmentIcons() {\\n        // 迭代固定 12 格確保冪等（R-2）：二次設定變少時，超出資料的格重置為預設，不殘留舊值\\n        for (let i = 0; i < FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT; i++) {\\n            const seg = i < this.m_segments.length ? this.m_segments[i] : null;\\n\\n            // 換 icon：None / 無資料格 → 清空（暫不顯示）；其餘依 type 換圖（BC-4）\\n            const spriteChange = this.m_segmentSpriteChanges[i];\\n            if (spriteChange) {\\n                if (!seg || seg.type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.None) {\\n                    spriteChange.ClearSprite();\\n                } else {\\n                    spriteChange.ChangeSpriteByIndex(TypeToIconIndex(seg.type));\\n                }\\n\\n                // FS_BG 底圖：與 icon 同生命週期，從同格 item root 取子節點（無資料/非 FreeGame 一律關，保冪等）\\n                const fsBg = spriteChange.node?.getChildByName('FS_BG');\\n                if (fsBg) {\\n                    fsBg.active = !!seg && seg.type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.FreeGame;\\n                }\\n            }\\n\\n            // 倍率值已移除：清空 Label，避免殘留設計期/前一次的文字\\n            const label = this.m_segmentValueLabels[i];\\n            if (label) {\\n                label.string = '';\\n            }\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 轉動並落在指定格（IF-3 / BC-3 / BC-6 / BC-7 / BC-8 / BC-9 / EH-1 / EH-3）\\n     * 守衛順序（DR-10）：① 轉動中重入 → ② 未初始化/無資料 → ③ landIndex 範圍\\n     * 完成訊號鏈（DR-2 / BC-7）：await 轉動 → await 落點演出 → callback → 最後釋放 m_isSpinning\\n     * @param landIndex 落點格索引 (0~11)\\n     * @param callback 完成回調，帶選中格 {index, type, value}\\n     */\\n    private async PlaySpin(landIndex: number, callback?: (result: SpinResult) => void) {\\n        // ① BC-9 轉動中重入 → 忽略\\n        if (this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 轉動中，忽略本次請求');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // ② EH-3 未初始化或無資料\\n        if (!this.m_isInit || this.m_segments.length === 0) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 未初始化或尚未設置輪盤資料');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // ③ EH-1 landIndex 範圍\\n        if (landIndex < 0 || landIndex >= FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel PlaySpin landIndex ${landIndex} 超出範圍 0~${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT - 1}`);\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        this.m_isSpinning = true;\\n        // 轉動開始即關閉 Idle：轉完「不」自動恢復；待盤面其他表演結束由 RESUME_IDLE 手動恢復\\n        this.m_isIdle = false;\\n        try {\\n            await this.RotateToIndex(landIndex);     // BC-3 / BC-6\\n            await this.PlayLandAnnounce(landIndex);  // BC-7\\n            const seg = this.m_segments[landIndex];\\n            // callback 包獨立 try（R-1）：呼叫端 callback 自身例外不被遮蔽成「轉動失敗」\\n            try {\\n                callback?.({ index: landIndex, type: seg.type });\\n            } catch (cbErr) {\\n                error('FeatureWheel PlaySpin callback 執行失敗: ' + cbErr);\\n            }\\n        } catch (e) {\\n            error('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 轉動/演出失敗: ' + e);\\n        } finally {\\n            // BC-7：釋放點在 callback 之後，避免演出/回呼期間被重入\\n            this.m_isSpinning = false;\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 旋轉到 landIndex，停在頂端指針（BC-3 / BC-6）\\n     * 角度計算用 ComputeTargetAngle（依 m_clockwise 單向單調，不沿用會反向的 angleDiff）\\n     */\\n    private RotateToIndex(landIndex: number): Promise<void> {\\n        return new Promise<void>((resolve) => {\\n            if (!this.m_wheelNode || !this.m_wheelNode.isValid) {\\n                resolve();\\n                return;\\n            }\\n            const currentAngle = this.m_wheelNode.eulerAngles.z;\\n            const targetAngle = ComputeTargetAngle(landIndex, currentAngle, this.m_clockwise);\\n            const anim = { angle: currentAngle };\\n            tween(anim)\\n                .to(FeatureWheelManager.ROTATE_TIME, { angle: targetAngle }, {\\n                    easing: 'cubicOut',\\n                    onUpdate: () => {\\n                        if (this.m_wheelNode?.isValid) {\\n                            this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, anim.angle);\\n                        }\\n                    },\\n                })\\n                .call(() => {\\n                    // DR-9：轉動結束後正規化角度，防 BC-8 連續轉動累積漂移\\n                    if (this.m_wheelNode?.isValid) {\\n                        this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, NormalizeAngle(targetAngle));\\n                    }\\n                    resolve();\\n                })\\n                .start();\\n        });\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 落點演出（BC-7）：BigWheel Spine 取代結果展示牌——依落點 type 切 skin，播 Collect「中間功能亮起」，await 播畢才 resolve。\\n     * 時序：呼叫端在 RotateToIndex（轉輪停下）後呼叫，符合「轉輪停下來後中間功能亮起」。\\n     * Collect 播畢後中間維持亮起（end pose），退場由 PlayExit 的 Out（盤面回歸+暗掉）負責。\\n     * Spine 缺失（m_bigWheelSpine 未綁）→ PlaySpineOnce 立即 resolve，不 hang 呼叫端。\\n     */\\n    private async PlayLandAnnounce(landIndex: number): Promise<void> {\\n        const seg = this.m_segments[landIndex];\\n        if (!seg) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // 先切到落點功能 skin（Multiplier/Upgrade 直對；Shift 暫用 default；FG/Grand/None → default），再播 Collect\\n        this.SetSpineSkin(TypeToSkin(seg.type));\\n        await this.PlaySpineOnce(BIG_WHEEL_ANIM.Collect);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 套用落點 type 對應圖到指定 SpriteChange（None → 清空；其餘依 TypeToIconIndex 換圖）\\n     * 給結果展示牌的符號與背景共用，確保兩者索引邏輯一致\\n     */\\n    private ApplyResultSprite(spriteChange: SpriteChange | null, type: FeatureWheelSegmentType) {\\n        if (!spriteChange) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.None) {\\n            spriteChange.ClearSprite();\\n        } else {\\n            spriteChange.ChangeSpriteByIndex(TypeToIconIndex(type));\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 隱藏結果展示牌（HIDE_RESULT 退場；暫代落點演出的收場）\\n     */\\n    private HideResult() {\\n        if (this.m_resultNode && this.m_resultNode.isValid) {\\n            this.m_resultNode.active = false;\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 顯示/隱藏 UI（IF-4）\\n     */\\n    private SetUIShow(isShow: boolean) {\\n        if (this.m_rootNode) {\\n            this.m_rootNode.active = isShow;\\n        }\\n        // 隱藏 UI 時一併收掉結果展示牌，避免下次顯示殘留上一輪落點符號\\n        if (!isShow) {\\n            this.HideResult();\\n        }\\n        // Idle：顯示時開始緩轉、隱藏時停止（PlaySpin 後不自動恢復，須由 RESUME_IDLE 手動恢復）\\n        this.m_isIdle = isShow;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 手動恢復 Idle 緩轉（IF）\\n     * 用途：PlaySpin 後輪盤停住，呼叫端在盤面其他表演結束後觸發此方法才續轉\\n     * 注意：若仍在轉動中，由 update 的 m_isSpinning 守衛延後至轉完才實際緩轉\\n     */\\n    private ResumeIdle() {\\n        this.m_isIdle = true;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch dev-only 設定斷言（DR-3/DR-12 緩解：驗節點數量，順序語意仍須人工核對 prefab）\\n     */\\n    private DevAssertConfig() {\\n        if (!DEV) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (this.m_segmentSpriteChanges.length !== FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel 設定異常：SpriteChange 數 ${this.m_segmentSpriteChanges.length} ≠ ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}`);\\n        }\\n        if (this.m_segmentNodes.length !== FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel 設定異常：落點節點數 ${this.m_segmentNodes.length} ≠ ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}`);\\n        }\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 方法\\n\\n    //#region 測試功能\\n    /**@ch 測試用：當前轉動落點索引（每次轉動 +1 循環 0~11）*/\\n    private m_testLandIndex = 0;\\n    /**@ch 測試用：當前 UI 顯示狀態（給 DIGIT_4 切換）*/\\n    private m_testUIShown = false;\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 註冊測試按鍵（僅 DEBUG 構建生效；正式構建零副作用）\\n     */\\n    private RegisterTestKeyCodes() {\\n        if (!DEBUG) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // input.on(Input.EventType.KEY_DOWN, this.CheckTestKeyCode, this);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 取消註冊測試按鍵（與 RegisterTestKeyCodes 對稱，避免監聽洩漏）\\n     */\\n    private UnregisterTestKeyCodes() {\\n        if (!DEBUG) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // input.off(Input.EventType.KEY_DOWN, this.CheckTestKeyCode, this);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 檢查測試按鍵，走真實 eventManager 事件路徑驗證 FeatureWheel 功能\\n     * DIGIT_1：初始化 + 設定預設輪盤資料 + 顯示 UI（一鍵就緒）\\n     * DIGIT_2：轉動到下一格（循環 0~11）並印出落點結果（驗證旋轉/落點演出/callback）\\n     * DIGIT_3：重設隨機輪盤資料（驗證 icon 與乘倍數值動態更新）\\n     * DIGIT_4：切換顯示/隱藏 UI\\n     */\\n    private CheckTestKeyCode(event: EventKeyboard) {\\n        switch (event.keyCode) {\\n            // case KeyCode.DIGIT_1:\\n            //     log('[FeatureWheel 測試] 初始化 + 設定預設資料 + 顯示 UI');\\n            //     // INIT 僅需非 null 物件以通過參數驗證並翻起 m_isInit；\\n            //     // m_gameView 在本元件未被讀取，測試以 this.node 佔位即可\\n            //     eventManager.Dispatch(FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.INIT, this.node);\\n            //     eventManager.Dispatch(FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SET_WHEEL_DATA, GetDefaultSegments());\\n            //     eventManager.Dispatch(FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SHOW_UI);\\n            //     break;\\n\\n            case KeyCode.DIGIT_2: {\\n                const landIndex = this.m_testLandIndex % FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT;\\n                this.m_testLandIndex++;\\n                log(`[FeatureWheel 測試] 轉動到第 ${landIndex} 格`);\\n                eventManager.Dispatch(FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_SPIN, landIndex, (result: SpinResult) => {\\n                    log(`[FeatureWheel 測試] 落點結果 index=${result.index} type=${result.type}`);\\n                });\\n                break;\\n            }\\n            \\n            case KeyCode.DIGIT_3:\\n                log('[FeatureWheel 測試] 恢復 Idle 緩轉');\\n content.thinking:
The session marked ApplyResultSprite and HideResult methods as disabled/deprecated with detailed documentation about why they're being kept and what will replace them. ApplyResultSprite is now unused after PlayLandAnnounce switched to Spine animations, but is retained until the art team confirms removal of the entire result-card path. HideResult is now a no-op because m_resultNode is being repurposed as the BigWheel Spine container, and hiding it would hide the entire wheel. The critical warning notes that m_resultNode can't be set to active=false in HideResult anymore because it would hide the BigWheel Spine component.

This is careful defensive programming preserving backward compatibility while transitioning to the new system.

content.text:
<observation>
  <type>change</type>
  <title>Marked ApplyResultSprite and HideResult as deprecated with defensive no-op for HideResult</title>
  <subtitle>Documented obsolete result card methods with critical warning that m_resultNode now serves as BigWheel Spine container and cannot be hidden</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>ApplyResultSprite marked [已停用] (disabled) with note that Collect animation replaced result card display, no remaining callers after PlayLandAnnounce rewrite</fact>
    <fact>ApplyResultSprite retained pending art confirmation before full removal alongside m_result* properties</fact>
    <fact>HideResult converted from active=false manipulation to no-op (empty comment implementation)</fact>
    <fact>Critical warning added: m_resultNode now repurposed as BigWheel Spine parent container, hiding it would hide entire wheel</fact>
    <fact>HideResult retained with empty implementation for backward compatibility with existing HIDE_RESULT event dispatches and SetUIShow(false) calls</fact>
    <fact>TODO marker added for full cleanup path: remove ApplyResultSprite, HideResult, and m_result* properties once result-card system fully retired</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Safely deprecated the result card display infrastructure while transitioning to Spine animation system. ApplyResultSprite, previously called from PlayLandAnnounce to update result card sprites, is now unused after the Spine rewrite but retained with [已停用] marker pending art team confirmation before removal alongside the entire m_result* property set. HideResult required more careful handling: instead of deletion, it was converted to a no-op implementation with a critical warning comment. The original logic set m_resultNode.active=false, but this is now unsafe because m_resultNode has been repurposed as the parent container for the BigWheel Spine component—hiding it would inadvertently hide the entire wheel. The no-op preserves compatibility with existing calls from HIDE_RESULT event handler and SetUIShow(false) without breaking wheel visibility. This defensive approach maintains a smooth transition path: existing code continues to function, new Spine animations work correctly, and the obsolete result-card infrastructure is clearly marked for future cleanup once the art team confirms the system is fully retired. The TODO marker provides a clear removal checklist for the eventual cleanup phase.</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>what-changed</concept>
    <concept>gotcha</concept>
    <concept>trade-off</concept>
  </concepts>
  <files_read>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>assets/Script/FeatureWheel/FeatureWheelManager.ts</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>

   /**\\n     * @ch BigWheel Spine（EyeStrike2_BigWheel）：進場 Active / 落點 Collect / 退場 Out / 待機 Idle，skin 依落點功能切換。\\n     * Collect 取代結果展示牌（m_result* 已停用，僅保留屬性避免 prefab 反序列化警告）。\\n     */\\n })\\n    private m_clockwise: boolean = true;\\n\\n    /**@ch Idle 緩轉一圈秒數（越大越慢；≤0 視為不緩轉）；方向跟隨「順時針轉動」*/\\n    @property({ displayName: 'Idle 一圈秒數' })\\n    private m_idleSecondsPerRev: number = 60;\\n    //#endregion 屬性\\n\\n    //#region 常數\\n    /**@ch 轉動時間（秒）；拉長以降低峰值角速度，減輕 12 格重複圖樣的車輪錯覺（視覺反向）*/\\n    private static readonly ROTATE_TIME = 3;//2.5;\\n    //#endregion 常數\\n\\n    //#region 變數\\n    /**@ch 遊戲視窗*/\\n    private m_gameView: GameView = null;\\n    /**@ch 是否初始化*/\\n    private m_isInit = false;\\n    /**@ch 是否轉動中（轉動中/閒置兩互斥態）*/\\n    private m_isSpinning = false;\\n    /**@ch 是否處於 格資料*/\\n    private m_segments: SegmentDescriptor[] = [];\\n\\n    /**@ch 事件列表*/\\n    private readonly EVENT_LIST: string[] = [\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.INIT,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SET_WHEEL_DATA,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_SPIN,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SHOW_UI,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_UI,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_ENTER,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_EXIT,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.RESUME_IDLE,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_RESULT,\\n    ];\\n    //#endregion 變數\\n\\n    //#region 生命週期\\n    onLoad() {\\n        this.RegisterEvent();\\n        this.DevAssertConfig();\\n        this.RegisterTestKeyCodes();\\n    }\\n\\n    onDestroy() {\\n        this.UnregisterEvent();\\n        this.UnregisterTestKeyCodes();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 每幀 Idle 緩轉：僅在 Idle 態且非轉動中執行（兩旋轉路徑互斥，不同幀寫 m_wheelNode）\\n     * 方向跟隨 m_clockwise（順時針 = z 遞減，與 ComputeTargetAngle 一致）\\n     */\\n    update(dt: number) {\\n        if (!this.m_isIdle || this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (this.m_idleSecondsPerRev <= 0) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (!this.m_wheelNode || !this.m_wheelNode.isValid) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        const dir = this.m_clockwise ? -1 : 1;\\n        const deltaAngle = dir * (360 / this.m_idleSecondsPerRev) * dt;\\n        // 正規化防 BC-8 連續累積漂移（與 RotateToIndex 收尾一致），spin 起點讀 currentAngle 仍正確\\n        const next = NormalizeAngle(this.m_wheelNode.eulerAngles.z + deltaAngle);\\n        this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, next);\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 生命週期\\n\\n    //#region 事件註冊\\n    private RegisterEvent() {\\n        if (this.m_isEventRegistered) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.m_isEventRegistered = true;\\n        this.EVENT_LIST.forEach(event => eventManager.Register(event, this));\\n    }\\n\\n    private UnregisterEvent() {\\n        if (!this.m_isEventRegistered) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.EVENT_LIST.forEach(event => eventManager.UnRegister(event, this));\\n        this.m_isEventRegistered = false;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 事件分派\\n     */\\n    OnEvent(event: string, ...args: any[]) {\\n        switch (event) {\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.INIT:\\n                if (args.length > 0 break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_UI:\\n                this.SetUIShow(false);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_ENTER:\\n                this.PlayEnter(typeof args[0] === 'function' ? args[0] : undefined);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_EXIT:\\n                this.PlayExit(typeof args[0] === 'function' ? args[0] : undefined);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.RESUME_IDLE:\\n                this.ResumeIdle();\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_RESULT:\\n                this.HideResult();\\n                break;\\n        }\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 事件註冊\\n\\n    //#region 方法\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 初始化（IF-1）\\n     */\\n    private Init(gameView: GameView) {\\n        this.m_gameView = gameView;\\n        this.m_isInit = true;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設置 12 格資料並更新 icon（IF-2 / BC-5 / EH-2）\\n     * @param segments server 給的 12 格資料\\n     */\\n    private SetWheelData(segments: SegmentDescriptor[]) {\\n        // BC-9 行為約束：轉動中拒絕換資料，避免落點與顯示不一致\\n        if (this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel SetWheelData 轉動中，拒絕本次設置');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (!segments) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel SetWheelData 資料為空');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        // EH-2：長度 > 12 取前 12\\n        if (segments.length > FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel SetWheelData 長度 ${segments.length} > ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}，取前 ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT} 格`);\\n        }\\n        this.m_segments = segments.slice(0, FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT);\\n\\n        // EH-2：長度 < 12 → 渲染已提供格，其餘格保持預設\\n        if (this.m_segments.length < FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel SetWheelData 長度 ${this.m_segments.length} < ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}，其餘格保持預設`);\\n        }\\n\\n        this.BindSegmentIcons();\\n\\n        this.m_isIdle = true;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 依當前資料綁定各格 icon（BC-4 / EH-2）\\n     * None / 無資料格 → 清空不顯示；其餘依 type 換圖。倍率值已移除，Label 一律清空防殘留。\\n     * FS_BG 底圖：僅該格 type 為 FreeGame 時開啟（作底凸顯免費遊戲符號）；其餘格關閉以保冪等（R-2）。\\n     */\\n    private BindSegmentIcons() {\\n        // 迭代固定 12 格確保冪等（R-2）：二次設定變少時，超出資料的格重置為預設，不殘留舊值\\n        for (let i = 0; i < FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT; i++) {\\n            const seg = i < this.m_segments.length ? this.m_segments[i] : null;\\n\\n            // 換 icon：None / 無資料格 → 清空（暫不顯示）；其餘依 type 換圖（BC-4）\\n            const spriteChange = this.m_segmentSpriteChanges[i];\\n            if (spriteChange) {\\n                if (!seg || seg.type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.None) {\\n                    spriteChange.ClearSprite();\\n                } else {\\n                    spriteChange.ChangeSpriteByIndex(TypeToIconIndex(seg.type));\\n                }\\n\\n                // FS_BG 底圖：與 icon seg.type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.FreeGame;\\n                }\\n            }\\n\\n            // 倍率值已移除：清空 Label，避免殘留設計期/前一次的文字\\n            const label = this.m_segmentValueLabels[i];\\n            if (label) {\\n                label.string = '';\\n            }\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 轉動並落在指定格（IF-3 / BC-3 / BC-6 / BC-7 / BC-8 / BC-9 / EH-1 / EH-3）\\n     * 完成回調，帶選中格 {index, type, value}\\n     */\\n    private async PlaySpin(landIndex: number, callback?: (result: SpinResult) => void) {\\n        // ① BC-9 轉動中重入 → 忽略\\n        if (this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 轉動中，忽略本次請求');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // ② EH-3 未初始化或無資料\\n        if (!this.m_isInit || this.m_segments.length === 0) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 未初始化或尚未設置輪盤資料');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // ③ EH-1 landIndex 範圍\\n        if (landIndex < 0 || landIndex >= FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel PlaySpin landIndex ${landIndex} 超出範圍 0~${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT - 1}`);\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        this.m_isSpinning = true;\\n        // 轉動開始即關閉 Idle：轉完「不」自動恢復；待盤面其他表演結束由 RESUME_IDLE 手動恢復\\n        this.m_isIdle = false;\\n        try {\\n            await this.RotateToIndex(landIndex);     // BC-3 / BC-6\\n            await /**\\n     * @ch 旋轉到 landIndex，停在頂端指針（BC-3 / BC-6）\\n     * 角度計算用 ComputeTargetAngle（依 m_clockwise 單向單調，不沿用會反向的 angleDiff）\\n     */\\n    private RotateToIndex(landIndex: number): Promise<void> {\\n };\\n            tween(anim)\\n                .to(FeatureWheelManager.ROTATE_TIME, { angle: targetAngle }, {\\n                    easing: 'cubicOut',\\n                    onUpdate: () => {\\n }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 落點演出（BC-7）：BigWheel Spine 取代結果展示牌——依落點 type 切 skin，播 Collect「中間功能亮起」，await 播畢才 resolve。\\n     * 時序：呼叫端在 RotateToIndex（轉輪停下）後呼叫，符合「轉輪停下來後中間功能亮起」。\\n     * Collect 格資料*/\\n    private m_segments: SegmentDescriptor[] = [];\\n\\n    /**@ch 事件列表*/\\n    private readonly EVENT_LIST: string[] = [\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.INIT,\\n update(dt: number) {\\n        if (!this.m_isIdle || this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (this.m_idleSecondsPerRev <= 0) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n    this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, next);\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 生命週期\\n\\n    //#region 事件註冊\\n    private RegisterEvent() {\\n        if (this.m_isEventRegistered) {\\n      if (label) {\\n                label.string = '';\\n            }\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 轉動並落在指定格（IF-3 / BC-3 / BC-6 / BC-7 / BC-8 / BC-9 / EH-1 / EH-3）\\n     * content.thinking:
This is a massive edit that implements all the core Spine animation methods. Let me break down what was added:

1. **ResumeIdle** - modified to add Spine Idle animation playback alongside the existing mechanical rotation
2. **PlayEnter** - new method implementing Active animation with callback
3. **PlayExit** - new method implementing Out animation with callback  
4. **SetSpineSkin** - helper to set Spine skin with null guards
5. **PlaySpineOnce** - core Promise-based method for playing single-shot animations
6. **PlaySpineLoop** - method for playing looping animations (Idle)

This completes the Spine animation infrastructure. The implementation follows the BigWinControll pattern closely and includes defensive programming (null guards, immediate resolution when Spine missing, fail-loud warnings).

Key design details:
- PlayExit does setSkin(default) AFTER Out animation (so Out dims the current feature skin)
- PlayEnter does setSkin(default) BEFORE Active (entry has no feature yet)
- PlaySpineOnce uses the dual-listener pattern from BigWinControll
- ResumeIdle now does both mechanical rotation (m_isIdle flag) AND Spine Idle loop
- All methods have null/validity guards to prevent crashes if m_bigWheelSpine unbound

This is a feature implementation completing the Spine animation system.

content.text:
<observation>
  <type>feature</type>
  <title>Implemented complete Spine animation infrastructure with PlayEnter, PlayExit, and helper methods</title>
  <subtitle>Added five Spine animation methods plus modified ResumeIdle to orchestrate Active/Collect/Out/Idle animations with defensive guards and callback support</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>ResumeIdle enhanced to call SetSpineSkin(BIG_WHEEL_DEFAULT_SKIN) and PlaySpineLoop(Idle) alongside existing m_isIdle flag for dual-layer animation (mechanical rotation + Spine breathing)</fact>
    <fact>PlayEnter implements Active entry animation: sets default skin, awaits PlaySpineOnce(Active), invokes callback with try-catch error isolation</fact>
    <fact>PlayExit implements Out exit animation: awaits PlaySpineOnce(Out) FIRST, then sets default skin after (Out dims current feature skin before returning to default)</fact>
    <fact>SetSpineSkin helper method wraps setSkin() with null and validity guards on m_bigWheelSpine</fact>
    <fact>PlaySpineOnce implements Promise-based single-shot animation playback: clearTrack, setToSetupPose, setAnimation with loop=false, setTrackCompleteListener with self-removal pattern from BigWinControll</fact>
    <fact>PlaySpineLoop implements non-awaited looping animation: clearTrack, setToSetupPose, setAnimation with loop=true, no completion listener</fact>
    <fact>Defensive design: all methods guard against null/invalid m_bigWheelSpine, PlaySpineOnce immediately resolves if animation name invalid with fail-loud warn preventing caller hang</fact>
    <fact>PlayEnter and PlayExit wrap callbacks in try-catch with error() logging to isolate caller exceptions per established R-1 pattern</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Completed the Spine animation infrastructure by implementing all five core animation methods and enhancing ResumeIdle. The implementation follows established codebase patterns from BigWinControll while adding defensive programming suitable for the FeatureWheel context. ResumeIdle now orchestrates dual-layer animation—the existing mechanical 12-segment rotation (m_isIdle flag controlling update() frame-by-frame angle changes) alongside the new Spine Idle looping animation providing breathing visual effects. PlayEnter and PlayExit implement session boundary animations with async/await, skin management, and callback invocation wrapped in try-catch for exception isolation. The key timing detail: PlayExit plays Out animation THEN resets skin to default (Out's "middle feature dimming" effect operates on the current landed feature skin, so default reset happens after dimming completes). SetSpineSkin provides a simple wrapper with null and validity guards preventing crashes if prefab binding incomplete. PlaySpineOnce forms the core Promise-based animation player: clears track 0, resets to setup pose, calls setAnimation with loop=false, registers completion listener that removes itself before resolving (dual-listener pattern matching BigWinControll). If setAnimation returns null (invalid animation name), it immediately resolves with fail-loud warning instead of hanging the caller—critical for maintaining DR-2 completion signal chain integrity. PlaySpineLoop handles looping animations (Idle) without awaiting since loops never complete—fire-and-forget pattern. All methods include spine null/validity guards making the system resilient to incomplete prefab setup. This completes the Spine animation system ready for FeatureWheelShowState integration: PLAY_ENTER dispatches Active before first spin, PlayLandAnnounce switches skins and plays Collect per spin, PLAY_EXIT dispatches Out after all spins, RESUME_IDLE restores breathing standby.</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>what-changed</concept>
    <concept>how-it-works</concept>
    <concept>pattern</concept>
  </concepts>
  <files_read>
  </files_read>

    <file>assets/Script/FeatureWheel/FeatureWheelManager.ts</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>

PLAY_SPIN(SlotIndex) 序列等待 → HIDE_UI → ROUND_SHOW_END\\n *   OUT — 落點後的盤面演出（符號轉 CASH / 乘倍 badge / 升級 / FG 交棒）由後續 plate 停輪或後續階段處理\\n *\\n * 不在此 State 改動狀態機路由：FG（Type=0/4）的實際進場仍走既有 CheckState/LeaveRespin 的 IsGoingToFree。\\n */\\n@ccclass( \\\"FeatureWheelShowState\\\" )\\nexport class FeatureWheelShowState extends BaseState\\n{\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 暫代 dwell（秒）：fly/mark 動畫尚未上線，非 GrandJP 落點展示牌會同幀閃掉看不到，\\n     * 故 HIDE_RESULT 前臨時停留一段。TODO(暫代)：PlayFlyEffect 實作真實耗時動畫後移除。\\n     */\\n    private static readonly RESULT_DWELL_SEC = 0.8;\\n\\n    private m_gameView: GameView = null;\\n\\n    constructor( gameView: GameView )\\n    {\\n        super();\\n        this.m_gameView = gameView;\\n    }\\n\\n    public async OnEnter()\\n    {\\n        log( \\\"OnEnter State : FEATURE_WHEEL_SHOW\\\" );\\n\\n        // 只取「有效」轉輪項（Type≠None）。理論上進到此 State 必有 ≥1（AfterShowWin 已用 HasActiveWheel 守衛），\\n        // 此處再過濾一次防禦：把混在其中的 None 項剔除，避免無意義轉動。\\n        const features = ( this.m_gameView.RoundInfo?.WheelFeatures ?? [] )\\n            .filter( w => w != null && w.Type !== FeatureWheelSegmentType.None );\\n\\n        if ( features.length === 0 )\\n        {\\n            // 不應發生（守衛已擋）；fail-loud 但不炸狀態機，直接續流程\\n            console.warn( \\\"[FeatureWheelShowState] 無有效 WheelFeatures，跳過轉輪演出\\\" );\\n            stateManager.NextState( Game_Define.GameState.ROUND_SHOW_END );\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        // eventManager.Dispatch( FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SHOW_UI );\\n\\n        // WheelCount 迴圈：逐項「序列等待」——PlaySpin 有 m_isSpinning 重入守衛，\\n        // 未等前一次 callback 就發下一次會被靜默丟棄（FeatureWheelManager 行為，BC-2 硬約束）。\\n        for ( const wf of features )\\n        {\\n            const landIndex = wf.SlotIndex ?? 0;\\n\\n            // 防 hang：PlaySpin 對越界 landIndex 是 warn+return（不呼叫 callback）→ 若 await 會永久掛住。\\n            // 故在 dispatch 前先驗範圍，越界則 fail-loud 跳過該次（不 await）。\\n            if ( landIndex < 0 || landIndex >= FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT )\\n            {\\n                console.warn( `[FeatureWheelShowState] SlotIndex=${landIndex} 越界 0~${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT - 1}，跳過該次轉動` );\\n                continue;\\n            }\\n\\n            const result = await this.PlaySpinOnce( landIndex );\\n\\n            // fail-loud 一致性：落點 type 應與 server WheelFeatures.Type 相符\\n            // （前提 P：server SlotIndex 與客戶端 12 格序一致——待 server 對拍；不符僅 warn 不阻流程）\\n            if ( result != null && result.type !== wf.Type )\\n            {\\n                console.warn( `[FeatureWheelShowState] 落點 type 不一致：landed=${result.type} vs server=${wf.Type}（SlotIndex=${landIndex}）` );\\n            }\\n\\n            // 飛個效果下來到盤面指定位置\\n            await this.PlayFlyEffect( wf );\\n\\n            // ②標記 seam：通知演出端在盤面標記此功能（標記/icon/乘倍/Grand報獎/FreeGame盤外 由同事 handler 渲染）。\\n            await this.PlayMarkEffect( wf );\\n\\n            // TODO(暫代)：fly/mark 動畫上線前，臨時停留讓展示牌可見；之後移除此 dwell。\\n            await Define.Wait( this.m_gameView, FeatureWheelShowState.RESULT_DWELL_SEC );\\n\\n            eventManager.Dispatch( FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_RESULT );\\n        }\\n\\n        // ③轉換 seam：標記後、進 respin 前，套用符號轉換（一般符號→CASH）。fire-and-forget；演出由同事 handler 渲染。\\n        const transferResult = this.m_gameView.RoundInfo?.TransferResult ?? [];\\n        if ( transferResult.length > 0 )\\n        {\\n            await this.PlaySymbolTransferEffect( transferResult );\\n        }\\n\\n        eventManager.Dispatch( FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.RESUME_IDLE );\\n\\n        stateManager.NextState( Game_Define.GameState.ROUND_SHOW_END );\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 包一層 Promise 等單次 PLAY_SPIN 完成回調\\n     * @param landIndex 落點格索引（已由呼叫端確認 0~11 範圍）\\n     */\\n    private PlaySpinOnce( landIndex: number ): Promise<SpinResult | null>\\n    {\\n        return new Promise<SpinResult | null>( resolve =>\\n        {\\n            eventManager.Dispatch(\\n                FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_SPIN,\\n                landIndex,\\n                ( result: SpinResult ) => resolve( result ?? null )\\n            );\\n        } );\\n    }\\n\\n    public OnProcess()\\n    {\\n\\n    }\\n\\n    public OnLeave()\\n    {\\n\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 播放飛行效果\\n     * @param data 飛行效果資料\\n     */\\n    private async PlayFlyEffect( data: ar2es2Proto.IFeatureResult )\\n    {\\n        // TODO: 飛個效果下來到盤面指定位置\\n        log( \\\"PlayFlyEffect data: \\\" + JSON.stringify( data ) );\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 播放標記效果\\n     * @param data 標記效果資料\\n     */\\n    private async PlayMarkEffect( data: ar2es2Proto.IFeatureResult )\\n    {\\n        log( \\\"PlayMarkEffect data: \\\" + JSON.stringify( data ) );\\n\\n        // 轉到 GRAND JP：不播標配標記，直接播 JP 報獎（JP_Manager 已實作，await 等報獎演完再續迴圈）。\\n        if ( data.Type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.GrandJP )\\n        {\\n            await new Promise<void>( resolve =>\\n            {\\n                eventManager.Dispatch( JP_EVENT.PLAY_SHOW_AWARD, JP_Type.GRAND, () => resolve() );\\n            } );\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        await new Promise<void>( resolve =>\\n        {\\n            eventManager.Dispatch( FEATURE_MARK_EVENT.SHOW_MARK, data.Type, data.Positions ?? [], () => resolve() );\\n        } );\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 播放符號轉換效果\\n     * @param data 符號轉換效果資料\\n     */\\n    private async PlaySymbolTransferEffect( data: ar2es2Proto.ITransformInfo[] )\\n    {\\n        await new Promise<void>( resolve =>\\n        {\\n            eventManager.Dispatch( FEATURE_MARK_EVENT.APPLY_TRANSFER, data, () => resolve() );\\n        } );\\n    }\\n}\\n\",\"structuredPatch\":[{\"oldStart\":1,\"oldLines\":7,\"newStart\":1,\"newLines\":6,\"lines\":[\" import { _decorator, log } from \\\"cc\\\";\",\" import GameView from \\\"../GameView\\\";\",\" import { BaseState, eventManager, stateManager } from \\\"db://astarte-framework/Managers\\\";\",\"-import { Define } from \\\"db://astarte-framework/utilis\\\";\",\" import Game_Define from \\\"../Game_Define\\\";\",\" import { FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT } from \\\"../FeatureWheel/FeatureWheelManager\\\";\",\" import { FeatureWheelSegmentType, FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT, SpinResult } from \\\"../FeatureWheel/FeatureWheelTypes\\\";\"]}],\"userModified\":false,\"replaceAll\":false}"</outcome>

content.thinking: The session is removing the Define import from FeatureWheelShowState.ts. This is because Define.Wait() was used for the temporary dwell timing (RESULT_DWELL_SEC = 0.8 seconds) before HIDE_RESULT dispatch, but with the Spine Out animation replacing the result card system, this dwell is no longer needed. The Out animation's natural timing will provide the appropriate visual duration instead of the artificial wait.

content.text:
<observation>
  <type>change</type>
  <title>Removed Define import from FeatureWheelShowState in preparation for Spine integration</title>
  <subtitle>Deleted Define import as Define.Wait() dwell timing will be replaced by natural Spine Out animation duration</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>Removed "import { Define } from 'db://astarte-framework/utilis'" line from FeatureWheelShowState.ts imports</fact>
    <fact>Define was used solely for Define.Wait(RESULT_DWELL_SEC) providing 0.8 second temporary dwell before HIDE_RESULT dispatch</fact>
    <fact>Temporary dwell existed because fly/mark animations not yet implemented, result card would flash away same-frame without visibility</fact>
    <fact>Spine Out animation will provide natural timing for exit/dimming, eliminating need for artificial wait</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Removed the Define utility import from FeatureWheelShowState.ts as preparation for Spine integration. The Define import was only used for Define.Wait(RESULT_DWELL_SEC), which implemented a temporary 0.8-second delay before dispatching HIDE_RESULT event. This artificial dwell was a workaround documented with TODO(暫代) noting it would be removed once PlayFlyEffect implements real animations—the delay prevented result cards from instantly disappearing before users could see them. With the transition to Spine-based animations, the Out animation's natural playback duration will provide appropriate visual timing for the wheel exit/feature dimming sequence, making the artificial wait obsolete. The next steps will integrate PLAY_ENTER before the spin loop and PLAY_EXIT replacing the dwell+HIDE_RESULT pattern.</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>what-changed</concept>
    <concept>why-it-exists</concept>
  </concepts>
  <files_read>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>assets/Script/GameState/FeatureWheelShowState.ts</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>

\\\"@igs-arcade-division-rd2/uk_872_eyestrike2_proto\\\";\\n\\nconst { ccclass } = _decorator;\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch Feature Wheel 轉輪演出 State（骨架 + 轉輪，不含落點後盤面效果）\\n *\\n * 位置：plate0 的 AWARD（對線獎）之後、ROUND_SHOW_END 之前（由 GameView.AfterShowWin 守衛導向）。\\n * 對應規格 3.1 STEP3-5「檢查轉輪 → 觸發轉輪 → 第一次發動」；重轉（STEP6）仍為後續 plate。\\n *\\n * 職責邊界（scope = 骨架+轉輪演出）：\\n *   IN  — SHOW_UI → 依 WheelFeatures 逐項 PLAY_SPIN(SlotIndex) 序列等待 → HIDE_UI → ROUND_SHOW_END\\n *   OUT — 落點後的盤面演出（符號轉 CASH / 乘倍 badge / 升級 / FG 交棒）由後續 plate 停輪或後續階段處理\\n *\\n * 不在此 State 改動狀態機路由：FG（Type=0/4）的實際進場仍走既有 CheckState/LeaveRespin 的 IsGoingToFree。\\n */\\n@ccclass( \\\"FeatureWheelShowState\\\" )\\nexport class FeatureWheelShowState extends BaseState\\n{\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 暫代 dwell（秒）：fly/mark 動畫尚未上線，非 GrandJP 落點展示牌會同幀閃掉看不到，\\n     * 故 HIDE_RESULT 前臨時停留一段。TODO(暫代)：PlayFlyEffect 實作真實耗時動畫後移除。\\n     */\\n    private static readonly RESULT_DWELL_SEC = 0.8;\\n\\n    private m_gameView: GameView = null;\\n\\n    constructor( gameView: GameView )\\n    {\\n        super();\\n        this.m_gameView = gameView;\\n    }\\n\\n    public async OnEnter()\\n    {\\n        log( \\\"OnEnter State : FEATURE_WHEEL_SHOW\\\" );\\n\\n        // 只取「有效」轉輪項（Type≠None）。理論上進到此 State 必有 ≥1（AfterShowWin 已用 HasActiveWheel 守衛），\\n        // 此處再過濾一次防禦：把混在其中的 None 項剔除，避免無意義轉動。\\n        const features = ( this.m_gameView.RoundInfo?.WheelFeatures ?? [] )\\n            .filter( w => w != null && w.Type !== FeatureWheelSegmentType.None );\\n\\n        if ( features.length === 0 )\\n        {\\n            // 不應發生（守衛已擋）；fail-loud 但不炸狀態機，直接續流程\\n            console.warn( \\\"[FeatureWheelShowState] 無有效 WheelFeatures，跳過轉輪演出\\\" );\\n            stateManager.NextState( Game_Define.GameState.ROUND_SHOW_END );\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        // eventManager.Dispatch( FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SHOW_UI );\\n\\n        // WheelCount 迴圈：逐項「序列等待」——PlaySpin 有 m_isSpinning 重入守衛，\\n        // 未等前一次 callback 就發下一次會被靜默丟棄（FeatureWheelManager 行為，BC-2 硬約束）。\\n        for ( const wf of features )\\n        {\\n            const landIndex = wf.SlotIndex ?? 0;\\n\\n            // 防 hang：PlaySpin 對越界 landIndex 是 warn+return（不呼叫 callback）→ 若 await 會永久掛住。\\n            // 故在 dispatch 前先驗範圍，越界則 fail-loud 跳過該次（不 await）。\\n            if ( landIndex < 0 || landIndex >= FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT )\\n            {\\n                console.warn( `[FeatureWheelShowState] SlotIndex=${landIndex} 越界 0~${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT - 1}，跳過該次轉動` );\\n                continue;\\n            }\\n\\n            const result = await this.PlaySpinOnce( landIndex );\\n\\n            // fail-loud 一致性：落點 type 應與 server WheelFeatures.Type 相符\\n            // （前提 P：server SlotIndex 與客戶端 12 格序一致——待 server 對拍；不符僅 warn 不阻流程）\\n            if ( result != null && result.type !== wf.Type )\\n            {\\n                console.warn( `[FeatureWheelShowState] 落點 type 不一致：landed=${result.type} vs server=${wf.Type}（SlotIndex=${landIndex}）` );\\n            }\\n\\n            // 飛個效果下來到盤面指定位置\\n            await this.PlayFlyEffect( wf );\\n\\n            // ②標記 seam：通知演出端在盤面標記此功能（標記/icon/乘倍/Grand報獎/FreeGame盤外 由同事 handler 渲染）。\\n            await this.PlayMarkEffect( wf );\\n\\n            // TODO(暫代)：fly/mark 動畫上線前，臨時停留讓展示牌可見；之後移除此 dwell。\\n            await Define.Wait( this.m_gameView, FeatureWheelShowState.RESULT_DWELL_SEC );\\n\\n            eventManager.Dispatch( FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_RESULT );\\n        }\\n\\n        // ③轉換 seam：標記後、進 respin 前，套用符號轉換（一般符號→CASH）。fire-and-forget；演出由同事 handler 渲染。\\n        const transferResult = this.m_gameView.RoundInfo?.TransferResult ?? [];\\n        if ( transferResult.length > 0 )\\n        {\\n            await this.PlaySymbolTransferEffect( transferResult );\\n        }\\n\\n        eventManager.Dispatch( FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.RESUME_IDLE );\\n\\n        stateManager.NextState( Game_Define.GameState.ROUND_SHOW_END );\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 包一層 Promise 等單次 PLAY_SPIN 完成回調\\n     * @param landIndex 落點格索引（已由呼叫端確認 0~11 範圍）\\n     */\\n    private PlaySpinOnce( landIndex: number ): Promise<SpinResult | null>\\n    {\\n        return new Promise<SpinResult | null>( resolve =>\\n        {\\n            eventManager.Dispatch(\\n                FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_SPIN,\\n                landIndex,\\n                ( result: SpinResult ) => resolve( result ?? null )\\n            );\\n        } );\\n    }\\n\\n    public OnProcess()\\n    {\\n\\n    }\\n\\n    public OnLeave()\\n    {\\n\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 播放飛行效果\\n     * @param data 飛行效果資料\\n     */\\n    private async PlayFlyEffect( data: ar2es2Proto.IFeatureResult )\\n    {\\n        // TODO: 飛個效果下來到盤面指定位置\\n        log( \\\"PlayFlyEffect data: \\\" + JSON.stringify( data ) );\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 播放標記效果\\n     * @param data 標記效果資料\\n     */\\n    private async PlayMarkEffect( data: ar2es2Proto.IFeatureResult )\\n    {\\n        log( \\\"PlayMarkEffect data: \\\" + JSON.stringify( data ) );\\n\\n        // 轉到 GRAND JP：不播標配標記，直接播 JP 報獎（JP_Manager 已實作，await 等報獎演完再續迴圈）。\\n        if ( data.Type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.GrandJP )\\n        {\\n            await new Promise<void>( resolve =>\\n            {\\n                eventManager.Dispatch( JP_EVENT.PLAY_SHOW_AWARD, JP_Type.GRAND, () => resolve() );\\n            } );\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        await new Promise<void>( resolve =>\\n        {\\n            eventManager.Dispatch( FEATURE_MARK_EVENT.SHOW_MARK, data.Type, data.Positions ?? [], data.Multipliers ?? [], () => resolve() );\\n        } );\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 播放符號轉換效果\\n     * @param data 符號轉換效果資料\\n     */\\n    private async PlaySymbolTransferEffect( data: ar2es2Proto.ITransformInfo[] )\\n    {\\n        await new Promise<void>( resolve =>\\n        {\\n            eventManager.Dispatch( FEATURE_MARK_EVENT.APPLY_TRANSFER, data, () => resolve() );\\n        } );\\n    }\\n}\\n\",\"structuredPatch\":[{\"oldStart\":25,\"oldLines\":12,\"newStart\":25,\"newLines\":6,\"lines\":[\" @ccclass( \\\"FeatureWheelShowState\\\" )\",\" export class FeatureWheelShowState extends BaseState\",\" {\",\"-    /**\",\"-     * @ch 暫代 dwell（秒）：fly/mark 動畫尚未上線，非 GrandJP 落點展示牌會同幀閃掉看不到，\",\"-     * 故 HIDE_RESULT 前臨時停留一段。TODO(暫代)：PlayFlyEffect 實作真實耗時動畫後移除。\",\"-     */\",\"-    private static readonly RESULT_DWELL_SEC = 0.8;\",\"-\",\"     private m_gameView: GameView = null;\",\" \",\"     constructor( gameView: GameView )\"]}],\"userModified\":false,\"replaceAll\":false}"</outcome>

PLAY_SPIN(SlotIndex) 序列等待 → HIDE_UI → ROUND_SHOW_END\\n *   OUT — 落點後的盤面演出（符號轉 CASH / 乘倍 badge / 升級 / FG 交棒）由後續 plate 停輪或後續階段處理\\n *\\n * 不在此 State 改動狀態機路由：FG（Type=0/4）的實際進場仍走既有 CheckState/LeaveRespin 只取「有效」轉輪項（Type≠None）。理論上進到此 State 必有 ≥1（AfterShowWin 已用 HasActiveWheel 守衛），\\n        // 此處再過濾一次防禦：把混在其中的 None 項剔除，避免無意義轉動。\\n        const features = ( this.m_gameView.RoundInfo?.WheelFeatures ?? [] )\\n            .filter( w => w != null && w.Type !== FeatureWheelSegmentType.None );\\n\\n        if ( features.length === 0 )\\n        {\\n            // 不應發生（守衛已擋）；fail-loud 但不炸狀態機，直接續流程\\n            console.warn( \\\"[FeatureWheelShowState] 無有效 WheelFeatures，跳過轉輪演出\\\" );\\n            stateManager.NextState( Game_Define.GameState.ROUND_SHOW_END );\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        // 進場 Active（盤面下降+灰塵+光效）：一個 round 一次，落在第一次轉動前；await 播畢（Spine 缺失則立即返回不 hang）\\n        await this.PlayWheelEnter();\\n\\n        // WheelCount 迴圈：逐項「序列等待」——PlaySpin 有 m_isSpinning 重入守衛，\\n        // 未等前一次 callback 就發下一次會被靜默丟棄（FeatureWheelManager 行為，BC-2 硬約束）。\\n        for ( const wf of features )\\n        {\\n            const landIndex = wf.SlotIndex ?? 0;\\n\\n            // 防 hang：PlaySpin 對越界 landIndex 是 warn+return（不呼叫 callback）→ 若 await 會永久掛住。\\n            // 故在 dispatch 前先驗範圍，越界則 fail-loud 跳過該次（不 await）。\\n            if ( landIndex < 0 || landIndex >= FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT )\\n            {\\n                console.warn( `[FeatureWheelShowState] SlotIndex=${landIndex} 越界 0~${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT - 1}，跳過該次轉動` );\\n                continue;\\n            }\\n\\n            const result = await this.PlaySpinOnce( landIndex );\\n\\n            // fail-loud 一致性：落點 type 應與 server WheelFeatures.Type 相符\\n            // （前提 P：server SlotIndex 與客戶端 12 格序一致——待 server 對拍；不符僅 warn 不阻流程）\\n            if ( result != null && result.type !== wf.Type )\\n            {\\n                console.warn( `[FeatureWheelShowState] 落點 type 不一致：landed=${result.type} vs server=${wf.Type}（SlotIndex=${landIndex}）` );\\n            }\\n\\n            // 飛個效果下來到盤面指定位置\\n            await this.PlayFlyEffect( wf );\\n\\n            // ②標記 seam：通知演出端在盤面標記此功能（標記/icon/乘倍/Grand報獎/FreeGame盤外 由同事 handler 渲染）。\\n            await this.PlayMarkEffect( wf );\\n\\n            // TODO(暫代)：fly/mark 動畫上線前，臨時停留讓展示牌可見；之後移除此 dwell。\\n            await Define.Wait( this.m_gameView, FeatureWheelShowState.RESULT_DWELL_SEC );\\n\\n            eventManager.Dispatch( FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_RESULT );\\n        }\\n\\n        // ③轉換 seam：標記後、進 respin 前，套用符號轉換（一般符號→CASH）。fire-and-forget；演出由同事 handler 渲染。\\n        const transferResult = this.m_gameView.RoundInfo?.TransferResult ?? [];\\n        if ( transferResult.length > 0 )\\n        {\\n            await this.PlaySymbolTransferEffect( transferResult );\\n        }\\n\\n        eventManager.Dispatch( FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.RESUME_IDLE );\\n\\n        stateManager.NextState( Game_Define.GameState.ROUND_SHOW_END );\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 包一層 Promise 等單次 PLAY_SPIN 完成回調\\n     * @param landIndex 落點格索引（已由呼叫端確認 0~11 範圍）\\n     */\\n    private PlaySpinOnce( landIndex: number ): Promise<SpinResult | null>\\n    {\\n        return new Promise<SpinResult | null>( resolve =>\\n        {\\n            eventManager.Dispatch(\\n                FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_SPIN,\\n                landIndex,\\n                ( result: SpinResult ) => resolve( result ?? null )\\n            );\\n        } );\\n    }\\n\\n    public OnProcess()\\n    {\\n\\n    }\\n\\n    public OnLeave()\\n    {\\n\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 播放飛行效果\\n     * @param data 飛行效果資料\\n     */\\n    private async PlayFlyEffect( data: ar2es2Proto.IFeatureResult )\\n    {\\n        // TODO: 飛個效果下來到盤面指定位置\\n        log( \\\"PlayFlyEffect data: \\\" + JSON.stringify( data ) );\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 播放標記效果\\n     * @param data 標記效果資料\\n     */\\n    private async PlayMarkEffect( data: ar2es2Proto.IFeatureResult )\\n    {\\n        log( \\\"PlayMarkEffect data: \\\" + JSON.stringify( data ) );\\n\\n        // 轉到 GRAND JP：不播標配標記，直接播 JP 報獎（JP_Manager 已實作，await 等報獎演完再續迴圈）。\\n        if ( data.Type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.GrandJP )\\n        {\\n            await new Promise<void>( resolve =>\\n            {\\n                eventManager.Dispatch( JP_EVENT.PLAY_SHOW_AWARD, JP_Type.GRAND, () => resolve() );\\n            } );\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        await new Promise<void>( resolve =>\\n        {\\n            eventManager.Dispatch( FEATURE_MARK_EVENT.SHOW_MARK, data.Type, data.Positions ?? [], data.Multipliers ?? [], () => resolve() );\\n        } );\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 播放符號轉換效果\\n     * @param data 符號轉換效果資料\\n     */\\n    private async PlaySymbolTransferEffect( data: ar2es2Proto.ITransformInfo[] )\\n    {\\n        await new Promise<void>( resolve =>\\n        {\\n            eventManager.Dispatch( FEATURE_MARK_EVENT.APPLY_TRANSFER, data, () => resolve() );\\n        } );\\n    }\\n}\\n\",\"structuredPatch\":[{\"oldStart\":82,\"oldLines\":10,\"newStart\":82,\"newLines\":8,\"lines\":[\"             // ②標記 seam：通知演出端在盤面標記此功能（標記/icon/乘倍/Grand報獎/FreeGame盤外 由同事 handler 渲染）。\",\"             await this.PlayMarkEffect( wf );\",\" \",\"-            // TODO(暫代)：fly/mark 動畫上線前，臨時停留讓展示牌可見；之後移除此 dwell。\",\"-            await Define.Wait( this.m_gameView, FeatureWheelShowState.RESULT_DWELL_SEC );\",\"-\",\"-            eventManager.Dispatch( FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_RESULT );\",\"+            // 落點顯示已由 BigWheel Collect 動畫（PlaySpin 內 await）負責，中間維持亮起至退場 Out；\",\"+            // 故不再需要結果展示牌的暫代 dwell 與 HIDE_RESULT。\",\"         }\",\" \",\"         // ③轉換 seam：標記後、進 respin 前，套用符號轉換（一般符號→CASH）。fire-and-forget；演出由同事 handler 渲染。\"]}],\"userModified\":false,\"replaceAll\":false}"</outcome>

content.thinking: The session removed the RESULT_DWELL_SEC constant that was used for the temporary 0.8 second dwell. This constant was documented with TODO(暫代) indicating it would be removed once real animations were implemented. Now that Spine Out animation will provide natural timing, this constant is no longer needed.

content.text:
<observation>
  <type>change</type>
  <title>Removed RESULT_DWELL_SEC constant from FeatureWheelShowState</title>
  <subtitle>Deleted temporary 0.8-second dwell constant that was workaround for missing fly/mark animations before Spine integration</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>Removed RESULT_DWELL_SEC = 0.8 constant declaration and its multi-line documentation comment</fact>
    <fact>Documentation explained it was temporary (暫代) workaround because fly/mark animations not yet implemented, preventing result cards from flashing away same-frame</fact>
    <fact>Comment included TODO(暫代) noting removal would happen once PlayFlyEffect implements real animations</fact>
    <fact>Constant was used in spin loop with Define.Wait() before HIDE_RESULT dispatch</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Removed the RESULT_DWELL_SEC constant definition from FeatureWheelShowState class. This constant held a temporary 0.8-second delay value used as a workaround documented with TODO(暫代). The documentation explained that without fly/mark animations implemented, result cards would disappear same-frame after landing, making them invisible to players—the artificial delay kept them visible long enough to see. With Spine Out animation now providing natural exit/dimming timing, this workaround constant becomes obsolete. The next edit will likely remove the actual Define.Wait() call site in the spin loop and replace the dwell+HIDE_RESULT sequence with PLAY_EXIT dispatch.</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>what-changed</concept>
    <concept>why-it-exists</concept>
  </concepts>
  <files_read>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>assets/Script/GameState/FeatureWheelShowState.ts</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>

content.thinking:
Two key edits happened:

1. First edit replaced the commented-out SHOW_UI dispatch with a call to PlayWheelEnter() before the spin loop. This adds the Active entry animation before the first spin, matching the design.

2. Second edit removed the temporary dwell (Define.Wait + HIDE_RESULT dispatch) after PlayMarkEffect in the spin loop, replacing it with an explanatory comment. The comment explains that BigWheel Collect animation (already awaited inside PlaySpin) now handles landing display, and the middle feature stays lit until the Out exit animation plays.

These changes integrate the Spine Active animation before spins and remove the obsolete result card cleanup logic. Next should be adding PlayWheelExit after the loop ends.

content.text:
<observation>
  <type>feature</type>
  <title>Integrated PlayWheelEnter before spin loop and removed dwell+HIDE_RESULT from loop body</title>
  <subtitle>Added Active entry animation await before first spin, eliminated temporary 0.8s dwell and HIDE_RESULT dispatch since Collect animation provides natural timing</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>Replaced commented SHOW_UI dispatch with await this.PlayWheelEnter() call before spin loop in OnEnter</fact>
    <fact>PlayWheelEnter documentation: "進場 Active（盤面下降+灰塵+光效）：一個 round 一次，落在第一次轉動前；await 播畢（Spine 缺失則立即返回不 hang）"</fact>
    <fact>Removed Define.Wait(RESULT_DWELL_SEC) and HIDE_RESULT dispatch from end of spin loop after PlayMarkEffect</fact>
    <fact>Replacement comment explains: "落點顯示已由 BigWheel Collect 動畫（PlaySpin 內 await）負責，中間維持亮起至退場 Out；故不再需要結果展示牌的暫代 dwell 與 HIDE_RESULT"</fact>
    <fact>Active animation plays once per round session before any spins, Collect animations play per-spin inside PlaySpinOnce workflow</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Integrated Spine session boundary timing into FeatureWheelShowState OnEnter workflow. Before the spin loop begins, added await this.PlayWheelEnter() to play the Active entry animation (wheel descent with dust and light effects) once per round. The comment emphasizes defensive design: if Spine missing, PlayWheelEnter immediately returns without hanging the state machine. Inside the spin loop, removed the temporary workaround that kept result cards visible—the TODO-marked Define.Wait(0.8 seconds) followed by HIDE_RESULT dispatch are now obsolete because PlaySpin internally awaits the Collect animation which provides natural timing for landing display. The replacement comment documents the timing change: BigWheel Collect animation (already awaited within PlaySpin→PlayLandAnnounce) handles result display, the middle feature stays visually lit after Collect completes (end pose hold), and will remain lit until the Out exit animation dims it at session end. This eliminates artificial timing and aligns with the Spine animation architecture where Collect's natural duration provides appropriate visibility without explicit delays. The next integration step will add PlayWheelExit after the spin loop completes and before RESUME_IDLE, replacing the session exit timing.</narrative>

content.thinking:
This is the final integration piece - adding PlayWheelExit after all spins and effects complete, plus implementing the PlayWheelEnter and PlayWheelExit Promise wrapper methods.

The edit:
1. Adds `await this.PlayWheelExit()` before RESUME_IDLE dispatch, after symbol transfer effects complete
2. Implements PlayWheelEnter() Promise wrapper that dispatches PLAY_ENTER and awaits callback
3. Implements PlayWheelExit() Promise wrapper that dispatches PLAY_EXIT and awaits callback

This completes the Spine integration timeline:
- OnEnter start: PlayWheelEnter (Active animation)
- Per spin: PlaySpin internally calls PlayLandAnnounce which plays Collect
- After all spins + effects: PlayWheelExit (Out animation)
- After Out completes: RESUME_IDLE (triggers Idle loop)

The Out animation dims the last Collect's held lit feature, then resets skin to default, completing the session boundary.

content.text:
<observation>
  <type>feature</type>
  <title>Completed Spine integration by adding PlayWheelExit after all effects and implementing Promise wrappers</title>
  <subtitle>Added Out exit animation after symbol transfer completes; implemented PlayWheelEnter and PlayWheelExit Promise wrappers for PLAY_ENTER/PLAY_EXIT events</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>Added await this.PlayWheelExit() call after symbol transfer effects complete, before RESUME_IDLE dispatch in OnEnter</fact>
    <fact>Comment documents timing: "退場 Out（盤面回歸+中間功能暗掉）：等全部轉動與效果（含 transfer）演完才播，一個 round 一次"</fact>
    <fact>Implemented PlayWheelEnter() Promise wrapper: dispatches PLAY_ENTER event with callback that resolves Promise when Active animation completes</fact>
    <fact>Implemented PlayWheelExit() Promise wrapper: dispatches PLAY_EXIT event with callback that resolves Promise when Out animation completes</fact>
    <fact>Both wrappers documented with defensive note: "Spine 缺失由 Manager 立即回調" ensuring no hang if Spine missing</fact>
    <fact>Timeline now: PlayWheelEnter (Active) → spin loop with per-spin Collect → PlaySymbolTransferEffect → PlayWheelExit (Out) → RESUME_IDLE (Idle)</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Completed the Spine animation integration by adding session exit timing and implementing Promise wrappers for boundary animations. After all spins complete and symbol transfer effects finish, OnEnter now calls await this.PlayWheelExit() which dispatches PLAY_EXIT event and waits for the Out animation to complete—this provides the natural exit/dimming sequence replacing the artificial dwell. The Out animation plays on the last landed feature's skin (Multiplier/Upgrade/default), dims the middle-segment highlight, then FeatureWheelManager.PlayExit resets the skin to default before invoking the callback that resolves the Promise. Only after Out completes does the flow proceed to RESUME_IDLE dispatch (which triggers Idle looping animation) and state transition. Implemented PlayWheelEnter and PlayWheelExit as Promise wrappers following the same pattern as existing PlaySpinOnce—wrap event dispatch with callback-based Promise resolution. Documentation notes that if Spine missing, Manager's defensive guards immediately invoke callbacks preventing state machine hangs. The complete Spine timeline is now: (1) OnEnter starts with PlayWheelEnter awaiting Active entry animation showing wheel descent with effects; (2) spin loop where each PlaySpin internally awaits PlayLandAnnounce which switches skin and plays Collect animation holding the lit feature in end pose; (3) PlaySymbolTransferEffect for any symbol conversions; (4) PlayWheelExit awaiting Out animation that dims the last feature and returns wheel to rest; (5) RESUME_IDLE dispatching event that triggers ResumeIdle calling PlaySpineLoop(Idle) for breathing standby; (6) state transition to ROUND_SHOW_END. This architecture eliminates all artificial timing delays, uses Spine animation natural durations for pacing, and maintains defensive guards against missing Spine assets.</narrative>

    <concept>pattern</concept>

2. **Test results**: 438/439 passing. The same pre-existing test failure from earlier ("SymbolConvert(3) → false") - this is the HasPostRespinFeature test that expects SymbolConvert to NOT trigger post-respin phase, but the implementation includes it. This failure predates the Spine work and is unrelated to the current changes.

The key finding: all the new Spine animation code (TypeToSkin, TYPE_SKIN_CONFIG, PlayEnter, PlayExit, PlaySpineOnce, PlaySpineLoop, SetSpineSkin, modified PlayLandAnnounce, PlayWheelEnter, PlayWheelExit) compiles without errors. The integration is syntactically complete.

This is a validation observation showing the implementation is complete and functional from a compilation standpoint.

  <narrative>Validation run confirms the Spine animation integration is syntactically complete and compiles without errors. TypeScript compilation with --noEmit flag filtered for FeatureWheel-related errors found none—all the new code (type mapping constants, animation methods, Promise wrappers, FeatureWheelShowState integration) passes TypeScript's type checking. Test execution shows 438/439 assertions passing, with the count increasing by 8 from the TypeToSkin test additions (verifying Multiplier→"Multiplier", Upgrade→"Upgrade", temporary SymbolConvert→default, FreeGame/GrandJP/None→default fallbacks, and BIG_WHEEL_DEFAULT_SKIN constant value). The single failure "SymbolConvert(3) → false" is the pre-existing HasPostRespinFeature test mismatch discovered earlier—the test expects SymbolConvert to return false (skip post-respin feature phase per "前段" comment), but the implementation includes it alongside Multiplier and Upgrade. This is a pre-existing issue unrelated to the Spine animation work and does not affect the integration's functional correctness. The Spine animation system is now fully integrated with clean compilation, comprehensive test coverage for the new type mapping logic, and ready for runtime validation with actual Spine assets in the Cocos Creator environment.</narrative>

<observation>
  <type>discovery</type>
  <title>Zero FeatureWheel errors in full TypeScript compilation confirms clean integration</title>
  <subtitle>All TypeScript errors are pre-existing framework/engine declaration issues; new Spine animation code produces no compilation errors</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>Grep filter for "FeatureWheel|error TS" returned zero FeatureWheel-specific errors across full tsc --noEmit run</fact>
    <fact>All displayed errors originate from framework/engine type declarations: cc.d.ts (Cocos Creator engine), editor.d.ts, electron.d.ts, extension.d.ts, message.d.ts from astarte-framework</fact>
    <fact>Error types include generic type argument mismatches, missing modules, duplicate signatures, property conflicts—all in third-party declaration files</fact>
    <fact>None of the new Spine code triggered errors: FeatureWheelTypes (TYPE_SKIN_CONFIG, TypeToSkin), FeatureWheelManager (PlayEnter, PlayExit, SetSpineSkin, PlaySpineOnce, PlaySpineLoop, modified PlayLandAnnounce/ResumeIdle), FeatureWheelShowState (PlayWheelEnter, PlayWheelExit integration)</fact>
    <fact>Pre-existing framework errors indicate project tolerates these type definition issues, not blocking for Cocos Creator runtime</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Full TypeScript compilation with deprecation warnings suppressed confirms the Spine animation integration is completely clean from a type-checking perspective. Filtering the comprehensive tsc --noEmit output for FeatureWheel-related errors returned zero matches—all displayed errors originate from pre-existing third-party type declaration files (Cocos Creator engine's cc.d.ts and Astarte framework's editor/electron/extension type definitions). The errors involve generic type argument mismatches in Map<T>, missing module declarations for internal Cocos/PAL modules, duplicate index signatures, and property type conflicts—all issues that predate the Spine work and are tolerated by the project's build/runtime environment. Critically, none of the newly added or modified code triggered TypeScript errors: TYPE_SKIN_CONFIG constant definition with Readonly<Partial<Record<>>> typing, TypeToSkin function with nullish coalescing, all five new Spine animation methods (PlayEnter/PlayExit/SetSpineSkin/PlaySpineOnce/PlaySpineLoop) with their sp.Skeleton interactions, the rewritten async PlayLandAnnounce using await, enhanced ResumeIdle adding Spine calls, and the FeatureWheelShowState integration with PlayWheelEnter/PlayWheelExit Promise wrappers. This validation confirms the implementation is type-safe, follows established patterns, and ready for runtime testing in Cocos Creator with actual Spine assets bound to the m_bigWheelSpine property.</narrative>

content.text:
<observation>
  <type>discovery</type>
  <title>Located Node_FeatureWheel prefab usage in MainGame.prefab for Spine binding</title>
  <subtitle>Node_FeatureWheel (uuid d5c98cf8-2c19-4979-9bcd-429898b4b2ac) is instantiated in MainGame.prefab requiring BigWheel Spine property binding</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>Node_FeatureWheel.prefab uuid: d5c98cf8-2c19-4979-9bcd-429898b4b2ac</fact>
    <fact>Prefab is used in assets/game/Prefab/MainGame.prefab</fact>
    <fact>MainGame.prefab contains the FeatureWheelManager component instance that needs m_bigWheelSpine property bound to EyeStrike2_BigWheel Spine skeleton</fact>
    <fact>Search confirmed no other scenes/prefabs reference Node_FeatureWheel, making MainGame.prefab the single binding location</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Identified the Cocos Creator prefab location where the new BigWheel Spine property needs to be bound to complete the runtime integration. Node_FeatureWheel.prefab is instantiated in MainGame.prefab, which means the FeatureWheelManager component's m_bigWheelSpine property must be assigned in the MainGame prefab hierarchy. The grep search confirmed MainGame.prefab is the only scene/prefab referencing Node_FeatureWheel (excluding the prefab's own meta file), making it the single binding point. The next step for runtime completion is opening MainGame.prefab in Cocos Creator editor, locating the Node_FeatureWheel instance, finding the FeatureWheelManager component, and dragging the EyeStrike2_BigWheel Spine skeleton node into the newly added "BigWheel Spine" property field. Without this binding, all the defensive Spine-missing guards will trigger (immediate resolve in PlaySpineOnce/PlaySpineLoop, no-op in SetSpineSkin), causing the system to gracefully degrade but skip all Spine animations.</narrative>
